```typescriptreact
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                      ref={isEditingThisDisk ? assignToolbarAnchor : undefined}
                      onMouseUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onKeyUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onTouchEnd={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {displayMarkdown ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = displayMarkdown
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          // Markdown rendering
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              {/* Table container - adaptive width */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  width: "100%", // Adaptive to container width
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto", // Auto layout for better text wrapping
                                  boxSizing: "border-box",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow text wrapping in cells
                                  wordWrap: "break-word", // Break long words
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word", // Break words when necessary
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                  borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                  minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow header text wrapping
                                  wordWrap: "break-word",
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                },
                                "& td": {
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& thead": {
                                  display: "table-header-group",
                                },
                                "& tbody": {
                                  display: "table-row-group",
                                },
                                "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                },
                              }}
                            >
                                <ReactMarkdown 
                                  remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
                                  rehypePlugins={[rehypeRaw]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Processing table", {
                                        childrenType: typeof children,
                                        childrenIsArray: Array.isArray(children),
                                        childrenLength: Array.isArray(children) ? children.length : 1,
                                        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Extract table data from children
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Extracted table data", {
                                        originalRowCount: tableData.length,
                                        originalColumnCount: tableData[0]?.length || 0,
                                        firstRow: tableData[0],
                                        sampleData: tableData.slice(0, 3), // 只记录前3行避免日志过长
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Transpose the table data
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Transposed table data", {
                                        transposedRowCount: transposedData.length,
                                        transposedColumnCount: transposedData[0]?.length || 0,
                                        willUseTranspose: transposedData.length > 0,
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Build transposed table structure
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        console.warn("⚠️ [Table Component] Transpose failed - using original table (fallback mode)", {
                                          reason: "transposedData.length === 0",
                                          originalDataRowCount: tableData.length,
                                          childrenStructure: Array.isArray(children) 
                                            ? children.map((child: any, idx: number) => ({
                                                index: idx,
                                                type: child?.type?.name || child?.type || typeof child,
                                                hasProps: !!child?.props,
                                                propsKeys: child?.props ? Object.keys(child.props) : [],
                                              }))
                                            : { type: typeof children, hasProps: !!(children as any)?.props },
                                        })
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      
                                      // First row becomes header row
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      
                                      console.log("✅ [Table Component] Using transposed table", {
                                        headerRowCount: headerRow.length,
                                        dataRowCount: dataRows.length,
                                        headerRow: headerRow,
                                        firstDataRow: dataRows[0],
                                      })
                                      
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
                                                  <td key={cellIndex}>{cell}</td>
                                                ))}
                                              </tr>
                                            ))}
                                          </tbody>
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                    text: ({ node, children }) => {
                                      const startOffset = node?.position?.start?.offset ?? 0
                                      const endOffset = node?.position?.end?.offset ?? startOffset
                                      return (
                                        <span data-md-start={startOffset} data-md-end={endOffset}>
                                          {children}
                                        </span>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                          ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
              )
            })
          ) : (
            <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const prevIsEditMode = prevProps.isEditMode || false
  const nextIsEditMode = nextProps.isEditMode || false
  const prevIsSelected = prevProps.isSelected || false
  const nextIsSelected = nextProps.isSelected || false
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isEditMode changes (critical for three-dot menu visibility)
  if (prevIsEditMode !== nextIsEditMode) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isEditMode changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsEditMode,
      nextIsEditMode,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isSelected changes
  if (prevIsSelected !== nextIsSelected) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isSelected changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsSelected,
      nextIsSelected,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if callback functions change
  if (prevProps.onSelect !== nextProps.onSelect ||
      prevProps.onEdit !== nextProps.onEdit ||
      prevProps.onDelete !== nextProps.onDelete ||
      prevProps.onRun !== nextProps.onRun) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: callback functions changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned,
    isEditMode: prevIsEditMode,
    isSelected: prevIsSelected,
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

添加原始 markdown 内容的日志，便于对比不同数据库的格式差异：


在渲染 markdown 前添加原始内容日志：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
import { Box, VStack, HStack, Text, Badge, useColorModeValue, IconButton, Tooltip, Menu, MenuButton, MenuList, MenuItem, Portal } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiLock, FiUnlock, FiMoreVertical, FiEdit, FiTrash2, FiType, FiPlay } from "react-icons/fi"
import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"
import remarkGfm from "remark-gfm"
import rehypeRaw from "rehype-raw"
import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react"
import type { EChartsOption } from "echarts"
import { GridItemData, RichTextCommand } from "./types"
import { useRichTextEditorState } from "./hooks/useRichTextEditorState"
import { AIGridRichToolbar } from "./AIGridRichToolbar"
import { clampSelectionRange } from "./utils/markdownTransformUtils"

interface AIGridItemProps {
  data: GridItemData
  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
  isEditMode?: boolean
  isSelected?: boolean
  onSelect?: () => void
  onEdit?: () => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  onRun?: () => void
  onTextEditChange?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => void
  onTextEditCommit?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => Promise<void> | void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// 提取表格数据：从 React 元素树中提取所有单元格内容
function extractTableData(tableChildren: React.ReactNode): string[][] {
  const rows: string[][] = []
  const debugInfo: any = {
    inputType: typeof tableChildren,
    isArray: Array.isArray(tableChildren),
    elementTypes: [] as string[],
    foundRows: 0,
    rowDetails: [] as any[],
  }
  
  const processElement = (element: any, depth: number = 0): void => {
    if (!element || typeof element !== 'object') {
      if (depth === 0) {
        console.log("🔍 [extractTableData] Element is null or not object:", { element, depth })
      }
      return
    }
    
    // 处理 React 元素
    if (element.type) {
      const type = element.type
      const typeName = typeof type === 'string' ? type.toLowerCase() : (typeof type === 'function' ? type.name || 'function' : String(type))
      
      // 记录元素类型（仅记录前10个，避免日志过多）
      if (debugInfo.elementTypes.length < 10) {
        debugInfo.elementTypes.push({ depth, typeName, hasProps: !!element.props, hasChildren: !!(element.props && element.props.children) })
      }
      
      // 如果是 tr（表格行），直接提取行数据
      if (typeName === 'tr') {
        const row: string[] = []
        const processCell = (cell: any): void => {
          if (cell && cell.props && cell.props.children !== undefined) {
            const cellContent = extractTextContent(cell.props.children)
            row.push(cellContent.trim())
          }
        }
        
        // 处理 children（td 或 th）
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const cellChildren = Array.isArray(element.props.children) 
            ? element.props.children 
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          cellChildren.forEach(processCell)
        }
        
        if (row.length > 0) {
          rows.push(row)
          debugInfo.foundRows++
          debugInfo.rowDetails.push({ rowIndex: rows.length - 1, cellCount: row.length, cells: row })
        }
        return // 找到 tr 后不再递归，避免重复处理
      }
      
      // 如果是 thead 或 tbody，递归处理其子元素
      if (typeName === 'thead' || typeName === 'tbody') {
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
            ? element.props.children
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          childElements.forEach(child => processElement(child, depth + 1))
        }
        return
      }
      
      // 其他元素递归处理子元素
      if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
        const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
          ? element.props.children
          : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
        childElements.forEach(child => processElement(child, depth + 1))
      }
    }
    
    // 处理数组
    if (Array.isArray(element)) {
      element.forEach(item => processElement(item, depth + 1))
    }
  }
  
  if (!tableChildren) {
    console.log("⚠️ [extractTableData] tableChildren is null/undefined, returning empty rows")
    return rows
  }
  
  const childArray = Array.isArray(tableChildren) ? tableChildren : [tableChildren]
  childArray.forEach(child => processElement(child, 0))
  
  // 输出调试信息
  debugInfo.finalRowCount = rows.length
  if (rows.length === 0) {
    console.warn("❌ [extractTableData] Failed to extract table data - no rows found", {
      ...debugInfo,
      tableChildrenStructure: JSON.stringify(tableChildren, (key, value) => {
        if (key === 'type' && typeof value === 'function') return value.name || 'function'
        if (key === 'props' && value && typeof value === 'object') {
          return { 
            children: value.children ? (Array.isArray(value.children) ? `[Array(${value.children.length})]` : typeof value.children) : undefined,
            ...Object.keys(value).filter(k => k !== 'children').reduce((acc, k) => ({ ...acc, [k]: typeof value[k] }), {})
          }
        }
        return value
      }, 2).substring(0, 1000) // 限制长度避免日志过长
    })
  } else {
    console.log("✅ [extractTableData] Successfully extracted table data", {
      rowCount: rows.length,
      columnCount: rows[0]?.length || 0,
      firstRow: rows[0],
      lastRow: rows[rows.length - 1],
      elementTypesFound: [...new Set(debugInfo.elementTypes.map(e => e.typeName))],
    })
  }
  
  return rows
}

// 提取文本内容：从 React 节点中提取纯文本
function extractTextContent(node: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof node === 'string' || typeof node === 'number') {
    return String(node)
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(node)) {
    return node.map(extractTextContent).join('')
  }
  
  if (node && typeof node === 'object' && 'props' in node) {
    if (node.props && node.props.children) {
      return extractTextContent(node.props.children)
    }
  }
  
  return ''
}

// 转置表格数据：行变列，列变行
function transposeTable(data: string[][]): string[][] {
  if (data.length === 0) return []
  
  const maxCols = Math.max(...data.map(row => row.length))
  const transposed: string[][] = []
  
  for (let col = 0; col < maxCols; col++) {
    const newRow: string[] = []
    for (let row = 0; row < data.length; row++) {
      newRow.push(data[row][col] || '')
    }
    transposed.push(newRow)
  }
  
  return transposed
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ 
  data, 
  onTogglePin,
  isEditMode = false,
  isSelected = false,
  onSelect,
  onEdit,
  onDelete,
  onRun,
  onTextEditChange,
  onTextEditCommit,
}) => {
  // New style: white background, no border (or very subtle), no rounded corners
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 14px for all titles/headers
  const titleTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "14px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for grid item (light by default, dark on hover)
  // Light mode: light gray track and thumb
  // Dark mode: darker gray track and thumb
  const gridScrollbarTrackLight = useColorModeValue("#f5f5f5", "#2d3748")
  const gridScrollbarThumbLight = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)")
  const gridScrollbarThumbDark = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)")
  
  // Scrollbar layout adjustments
  const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [activeDiskId, setActiveDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [toolbarAnchorRect, setToolbarAnchorRect] = useState<DOMRect | null>(null)
  const toolbarAnchorRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const [editedMarkdownByDisk, setEditedMarkdownByDisk] = useState<Map<number, string>>(new Map())
  const primaryDisk = data.disks[0]
  const canEditText = !!primaryDisk?.latestResult?.conclusion_detail
  const {
    isOpen: isTextEditorOpen,
    activeGridItemId,
    currentMarkdown,
    selection,
    openEditor,
    applyCommand,
    updateSelection,
    closeEditor,
  } = useRichTextEditorState()
  const scrollPaddingRight = isMenuOpen ? 'calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 10px)' : 'calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 8px)'
  const scrollMarginRight = isMenuOpen ? '-6px' : '-6px'
  // Refs for grid item
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode && isMenuOpen) {
      setIsMenuOpen(false)
    }
  }, [isEditMode, isMenuOpen])

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  const isToolbarVisible =
    isEditMode && isTextEditorOpen && activeGridItemId === data.i && toolbarAnchorRect !== null

  const assignToolbarAnchor = useCallback(
    (node: HTMLDivElement | null) => {
      if (node && isTextEditorOpen) {
        toolbarAnchorRef.current = node
        setToolbarAnchorRect(node.getBoundingClientRect())
      } else if (!node && toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
        toolbarAnchorRef.current = null
        setToolbarAnchorRect(null)
      }
    },
    [isTextEditorOpen]
  )

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isToolbarVisible || !toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
      return
    }
    const updateRect = () => {
      if (toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
        setToolbarAnchorRect(toolbarAnchorRef.current.getBoundingClientRect())
      }
    }
    updateRect()
    window.addEventListener("scroll", updateRect, true)
    window.addEventListener("resize", updateRect)
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", updateRect, true)
      window.removeEventListener("resize", updateRect)
    }
  }, [isToolbarVisible, currentMarkdown])

  const getSelectionFromDom = useCallback((): { start: number; end: number } | null => {
    if (!toolbarAnchorRef.current) return null
    const selectionObj = window.getSelection()
    if (!selectionObj || selectionObj.rangeCount === 0) return null
    const range = selectionObj.getRangeAt(0)
    if (
      !toolbarAnchorRef.current.contains(range.startContainer) ||
      !toolbarAnchorRef.current.contains(range.endContainer)
    ) {
      return null
    }
    const resolveOffset = (node: Node, offset: number): number | null => {
      const element =
        node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE
          ? (node.parentElement?.closest("[data-md-start]") as HTMLElement | null)
          : (node as HTMLElement).closest("[data-md-start]") as HTMLElement | null
      if (!element) return null
      const baseStart = Number.parseInt(element.dataset.mdStart ?? "0", 10)
      return node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? baseStart + offset : baseStart
    }
    const start = resolveOffset(range.startContainer, range.startOffset)
    const end = resolveOffset(range.endContainer, range.endOffset)
    if (start === null || end === null) {
      const fallbackText = selectionObj.toString()
      if (!fallbackText) {
        return null
      }
      const preferredStart =
        selection.start < selection.end
          ? currentMarkdown.indexOf(fallbackText, selection.start)
          : -1
      const absoluteStart =
        preferredStart !== -1 ? preferredStart : currentMarkdown.indexOf(fallbackText)
      if (absoluteStart === -1) {
        return null
      }
      return clampSelectionRange(currentMarkdown, {
        start: absoluteStart,
        end: absoluteStart + fallbackText.length,
      })
    }
    return clampSelectionRange(currentMarkdown, { start, end })
  }, [currentMarkdown, selection])

  const captureSelection = useCallback(() => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i) return
    const selectionRange = getSelectionFromDom()
    if (selectionRange) {
      updateSelection(selectionRange)
    }
  }, [activeGridItemId, data.i, getSelectionFromDom, isTextEditorOpen, updateSelection])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen) return
    document.addEventListener("selectionchange", captureSelection)
    return () => document.removeEventListener("selectionchange", captureSelection)
  }, [captureSelection, isTextEditorOpen])

  const commitTextEdit = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i || activeDiskId === null) {
      return
    }
    const result = closeEditor({ commit: true })
    if (result.hasChanges && result.committedMarkdown) {
      await onTextEditCommit?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: activeDiskId,
        markdown: result.committedMarkdown,
      })
      setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(activeDiskId, result.committedMarkdown || "")
        return next
      })
    }
    setActiveDiskId(null)
    setToolbarAnchorRect(null)
  }, [activeDiskId, activeGridItemId, closeEditor, data.i, isTextEditorOpen, onTextEditCommit])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode) {
      void commitTextEdit()
    }
  }, [commitTextEdit, isEditMode])

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      void commitTextEdit()
    }
  }, [commitTextEdit])

  const handleToolbarCommand = useCallback(
    (command: RichTextCommand) => {
      if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i || activeDiskId === null) {
        return
      }
      const result = applyCommand(command)
      if (result) {
        setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          next.set(activeDiskId, result.markdown)
          return next
        })
        onTextEditChange?.({
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: activeDiskId,
          markdown: result.markdown,
        })
      }
    },
    [activeDiskId, activeGridItemId, applyCommand, data.i, isTextEditorOpen, onTextEditChange]
  )

  const handleEditText = useCallback(
    (disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | undefined) => {
      if (!disk) return
      void commitTextEdit()
      const baseMarkdown =
        editedMarkdownByDisk.get(disk.id) ?? disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail ?? ""
      setActiveDiskId(disk.id)
      openEditor({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        markdown: baseMarkdown,
        selection: { start: 0, end: baseMarkdown.length },
      })
      setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(disk.id, baseMarkdown)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: disk.id,
        markdown: baseMarkdown,
      })
    },
    [commitTextEdit, data.i, editedMarkdownByDisk, onTextEditChange, openEditor]
  )

  
  // Handle click to select (only in edit mode)
  const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (isEditMode && onSelect) {
      // Don't select if clicking on buttons or menu
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      if (!target.closest('button') && !target.closest('[role="menu"]')) {
        onSelect()
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Border style: selected state shows blue border, pinned state shows orange border
  const borderWidth = isSelected ? "2px" : (isPinned ? "3px" : "0px")
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const borderColorSelected = "blue.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isSelected ? borderColorSelected : (isPinned ? borderColorPinned : "transparent")


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="0"
      pt={4}
      pl={4}
      pr={4}
      pb={2}
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="hidden"
      shadow={isSelected ? "lg" : "none"}
      sx={{
        paddingRight: scrollPaddingRight,
        marginRight: scrollMarginRight,
        scrollbarWidth: 'thin',
        scrollbarGutter: 'auto',
        scrollbarColor: `${gridScrollbarThumbLight} ${gridScrollbarTrackLight}`,
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar': {
          width: '8px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-track': {
          background: gridScrollbarTrackLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb': {
          background: gridScrollbarThumbLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
          transition: 'background 0.2s ease',
          '&:hover': {
            background: gridScrollbarThumbDark,
          },
        },
      }}
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s"
      onClick={handleClick}
      cursor={isEditMode ? "pointer" : "default"}
      _hover={isEditMode ? { borderColor: isSelected ? "blue.500" : "gray.300", borderWidth: "1px" } : {}}
    >
      {/* Selection corner indicators (blue squares) */}
      {isSelected && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag (disabled in edit mode) */}
      {!isEditMode && (
        <Box
          className="grid-drag-handle"
          position="absolute"
          top={0}
          left={0}
          right={0}
          bottom={0}
          cursor="grab"
          _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
          zIndex={1}
        />
      )}
      {/* Top Right Buttons Container - Mutually exclusive: three-dot menu in edit mode, Pin button in non-edit mode */}
      {/* Position adjusted to avoid overlap with scrollbar (scrollbar width ~8-17px); add extra 8px spacing */}
      <Box 
        position="absolute" 
        top={2} 
        right="28px"
        zIndex={1001}
        pointerEvents="auto"
      >
        {/* Three dots menu (only in edit mode) - replaces Pin button */}
        {isEditMode ? (
          (() => {
            console.log("🔵 AIGridItem rendering three-dot menu (edit mode):", {
              itemId: data.i,
              isEditMode,
              hasOnEdit: !!onEdit,
              hasOnDelete: !!onDelete,
            })
            return (
              <Menu
                onOpen={() => setIsMenuOpen(true)}
                onClose={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                <MenuButton
                  as={IconButton}
                  aria-label="More options"
                  icon={<FiMoreVertical />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    console.log("🔵 Three-dot menu button clicked")
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                />
                <Portal containerRef={gridItemRef}>
                  <MenuList
                    onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    overflow="visible"
                    maxH="unset"
                    onWheel={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    onTouchMove={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    sx={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}
                    css={{
                      '&::-webkit-scrollbar': { display: 'none' },
                    }}
                  >
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiEdit />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      console.log("🔵 Edit menu item clicked")
                      onEdit?.()
                    }}>
                      编辑Disk属性
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiType />} isDisabled={!canEditText} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      handleEditText(primaryDisk)
                    }}>
                      编辑文本
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiPlay />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onRun?.()
                    }}>
                      运行
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiTrash2 />} color="red.500" onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onDelete?.()
                    }}>
                      Delete
                    </MenuItem>
                  </MenuList>
                </Portal>
              </Menu>
            )
          })()
        ) : (
          /* Pin/Unpin Button (only in non-edit mode) - replaces three-dot menu */
          onTogglePin ? (
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          ) : null
        )}
      </Box>
      {isEditMode && (
        <AIGridRichToolbar
          isVisible={isToolbarVisible}
          anchorRect={toolbarAnchorRect}
          onCommand={handleToolbarCommand}
        />
      )}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="visible">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => {
              const baseMarkdown = disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail ?? ""
              const cachedMarkdown = editedMarkdownByDisk.get(disk.id)
              const isEditingThisDisk =
                isTextEditorOpen && activeDiskId === disk.id && activeGridItemId === data.i
              const displayMarkdown = isEditingThisDisk
                ? currentMarkdown
                : cachedMarkdown ?? baseMarkdown
              
              // 记录原始 markdown 内容（用于调试表格转置问题）
              if (displayMarkdown && displayMarkdown.includes('|')) {
                const tableMatches = displayMarkdown.match(/\|.*\|/g)
                if (tableMatches && tableMatches.length > 0) {
                  console.log("📝 [AIGridItem] Markdown content with table detected", {
                    diskId: disk.id,
                    markdownLength: displayMarkdown.length,
                    tableLineCount: tableMatches.length,
                    firstTableLines: displayMarkdown.split('\n').filter(line => line.includes('|')).slice(0, 5),
                    sampleTableContent: displayMarkdown.substring(
                      Math.max(0, displayMarkdown.indexOf('|') - 50),
                      Math.min(displayMarkdown.length, displayMarkdown.indexOf('|') + 500)
                    ),
                  })
                }
              }

              return (
                <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflow="visible"
                        >
                          <HStack
                            spacing={4}
                            align="stretch"
                            flexWrap="wrap"
                          >
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                flex="1 1 360px"
                                minW="260px"
                                maxW="480px"
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="0"
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="350px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                      ref={isEditingThisDisk ? assignToolbarAnchor : undefined}
                      onMouseUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onKeyUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onTouchEnd={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {displayMarkdown ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = displayMarkdown
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          // Markdown rendering
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              {/* Table container - adaptive width */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  width: "100%", // Adaptive to container width
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto", // Auto layout for better text wrapping
                                  boxSizing: "border-box",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow text wrapping in cells
                                  wordWrap: "break-word", // Break long words
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word", // Break words when necessary
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                  borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                  minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow header text wrapping
                                  wordWrap: "break-word",
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                },
                                "& td": {
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& thead": {
                                  display: "table-header-group",
                                },
                                "& tbody": {
                                  display: "table-row-group",
                                },
                                "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                },
                              }}
                            >
                                <ReactMarkdown 
                                  remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
                                  rehypePlugins={[rehypeRaw]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Processing table", {
                                        childrenType: typeof children,
                                        childrenIsArray: Array.isArray(children),
                                        childrenLength: Array.isArray(children) ? children.length : 1,
                                        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Extract table data from children
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Extracted table data", {
                                        originalRowCount: tableData.length,
                                        originalColumnCount: tableData[0]?.length || 0,
                                        firstRow: tableData[0],
                                        sampleData: tableData.slice(0, 3), // 只记录前3行避免日志过长
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Transpose the table data
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      
                                      console.log("📊 [Table Component] Transposed table data", {
                                        transposedRowCount: transposedData.length,
                                        transposedColumnCount: transposedData[0]?.length || 0,
                                        willUseTranspose: transposedData.length > 0,
                                      })
                                      
                                      // Build transposed table structure
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        console.warn("⚠️ [Table Component] Transpose failed - using original table (fallback mode)", {
                                          reason: "transposedData.length === 0",
                                          originalDataRowCount: tableData.length,
                                          childrenStructure: Array.isArray(children) 
                                            ? children.map((child: any, idx: number) => ({
                                                index: idx,
                                                type: child?.type?.name || child?.type || typeof child,
                                                hasProps: !!child?.props,
                                                propsKeys: child?.props ? Object.keys(child.props) : [],
                                              }))
                                            : { type: typeof children, hasProps: !!(children as any)?.props },
                                        })
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      
                                      // First row becomes header row
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      
                                      console.log("✅ [Table Component] Using transposed table", {
                                        headerRowCount: headerRow.length,
                                        dataRowCount: dataRows.length,
                                        headerRow: headerRow,
                                        firstDataRow: dataRows[0],
                                      })
                                      
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
                                                  <td key={cellIndex}>{cell}</td>
                                                ))}
                                              </tr>
                                            ))}
                                          </tbody>
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                    text: ({ node, children }) => {
                                      const startOffset = node?.position?.start?.offset ?? 0
                                      const endOffset = node?.position?.end?.offset ?? startOffset
                                      return (
                                        <span data-md-start={startOffset} data-md-end={endOffset}>
                                          {children}
                                        </span>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                          ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
              )
            })
          ) : (
            <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const prevIsEditMode = prevProps.isEditMode || false
  const nextIsEditMode = nextProps.isEditMode || false
  const prevIsSelected = prevProps.isSelected || false
  const nextIsSelected = nextProps.isSelected || false
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isEditMode changes (critical for three-dot menu visibility)
  if (prevIsEditMode !== nextIsEditMode) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isEditMode changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsEditMode,
      nextIsEditMode,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isSelected changes
  if (prevIsSelected !== nextIsSelected) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isSelected changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsSelected,
      nextIsSelected,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if callback functions change
  if (prevProps.onSelect !== nextProps.onSelect ||
      prevProps.onEdit !== nextProps.onEdit ||
      prevProps.onDelete !== nextProps.onDelete ||
      prevProps.onRun !== nextProps.onRun) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: callback functions changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned,
    isEditMode: prevIsEditMode,
    isSelected: prevIsSelected,
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

## 已添加的调试日志

### 1. **Markdown 内容检测日志**（第724-739行）
- 检测包含表格的 markdown 内容
- 记录 diskId、markdown 长度、表格行数
- 记录前5行表格内容和表格附近的原始文本（前后各50-500字符）

### 2. **表格组件处理日志**（第1005-1029行）
- 记录表格组件开始处理时的 children 结构
- 记录提取的原始表格数据（行数、列数、前3行数据）
- 记录转置后的数据（行数、列数、是否使用转置）

### 3. **表格转置失败警告**（第1032-1044行）
- 当转置失败时，记录失败原因
- 记录原始数据行数
- 记录 children 的详细结构（类型、props、keys）

### 4. **表格转置成功日志**（第1063-1068行）
- 记录成功转置后的表头和数据行信息

### 5. **extractTableData 函数详细日志**（第59-174行）
- 成功时：记录提取的行数、列数、首末行数据、发现的元素类型
- 失败时：记录输入类型、元素类型、DOM 结构（限制长度避免日志过长）

## 使用方法

1. 打开浏览器开发者工具（F12）
2. 切换到 Console 标签
3. 访问 `/aigrid` 页面
4. 查看控制台日志，关注以下标记：
   - `📝 [AIGridItem]` - Markdown 内容检测
   - `📊 [Table Component]` - 表格处理过程
   - `✅ [extractTableData]` - 成功提取表格数据
   - `❌ [extractTableData]` - 提取失败
   - `⚠️ [Table Component]` - 转置失败回退

## 对比分析建议

1. 本地 dev 模式（正常转置）：
   - 查看 `✅ [extractTableData]` 日志，记录成功的 DOM 结构
   - 查看 `📝 [AIGridItem]` 日志，记录 markdown 格式

2. Server staging 模式（转置失败）：
   - 查看 `❌ [extractTableData]` 日志，记录失败的 DOM 结构
   - 查看 `⚠️ [Table Component]` 日志，记录回退原因
   - 对比 markdown 格式差异

3. 同步数据库后本地（转置失败）：
   - 对比同步前后的日志差异
   - 重点关注 `tableChildrenStructure` 字段的差异

这些日志应能帮助定位表格转置失败的根本原因。请运行项目并查看控制台输出，然后分享日志结果以便进一步分析。

## 问题分析

### 从日志看到的情况

   - `extractTableData` 提取了 10行 x 2列
   - `transposeTable` 转置为 2行 x 10列

   - `✅ [Table Component] Using transposed table` 显示 headerRowCount: 10, dataRowCount: 1

2. 实际展示的表格：

- 实际展示的表格：15列，可能是另一个表格，未触发转置

2. 某些表格的 DOM 结构导致 `extractTableData` 无法正确提取
3. 表格格式差异（如缺少表头分隔符）导致解析失败

增强对不同表格格式的兼容性，确保所有表格都能被正确提取和转置。

### 方案3：从原始 Markdown 解析表格
不依赖 ReactMarkdown 的 DOM 结构，直接从原始 Markdown 文本解析表格，然后转置。

## 问题分析

### 从日志看到的情况

1. 原始表格结构（从日志）：
   - 10行 x 2列
   - 第一行：`['指标', '值']`

2. 转置后的结构（从日志）：

   - 表头行：10列（指标、总笔数、已合规笔数、...、编制人）

   - 1行数据：值、1、0、1、...

### 问题定位

转置逻辑已执行，但展示结果与预期不一致。

可能原因：
1. ReactMarkdown 的 `components` 覆盖可能未完全生效，原始表格仍被渲染
2. 存在多个表格，转置只处理了其中一个
3. 转置后的表格结构被后续处理覆盖

### 关键发现

从代码看（第1087-1113行），转置后的表格应返回新的 `<table>` 结构，但可能存在：
- ReactMarkdown 内部缓存导致原始表格仍被渲染
- `props` 传递问题导致样式或结构异常
- 多个表格时，转置逻辑只处理了部分表格

## 解决方案建议

### 方案1：强制覆盖原始表格渲染（推荐）
在返回转置后的表格时，确保完全覆盖 ReactMarkdown 的原始渲染，并添加唯一标识以便调试。

### 方案2：添加表格唯一标识
为每个表格添加唯一 ID，记录所有表格的处理情况，确保所有表格都被转置。

### 方案3：优化转置逻辑
检查 `transposeTable` 函数，确保转置逻辑正确，特别是处理边界情况。

## 问题分析

### 数据库中的实际格式

从数据库查询结果看，表格格式是：

```markdown
| 指标 | 值 |
|---|---:|
| 总笔数 | 1 |
| 已合规笔数 | 0 |
| 不合规笔数 | 1 |
| ... (共10行) |
```

这是 2列 x 10行 的格式（这是你想要的格式）。

### 问题根源

1. 数据库中存储：2列 x 10行（你想要的格式）
2. 代码逻辑：对所有表格都进行转置
3. 转置后：10列 x 2行（不是你想要的格式）
4. 最终展示：10列 x 2行（转置后的结果）

### 你的真实需求

- 当表格列数远大于行数时（如 10列 x 2行），需要转置为 2列 x 10行，便于在 grid 框中阅览
- 当表格已经是列数少、行数多的格式时（如 2列 x 10行），不需要转置，直接显示

### 解决方案

添加条件判断：只有当列数 > 行数时才转置；否则保持原样。

具体逻辑：
- 如果 `原始列数 > 原始行数` → 转置（列变行，行变列）
- 如果 `原始列数 <= 原始行数` → 不转置，直接显示原始表格

## 修改方案

我建议修改 `AIGridItem.tsx` 中的表格转置逻辑，添加条件判断：

```typescript
// 只有当列数 > 行数时才转置
if (tableData.length > 0 && tableData[0].length > tableData.length) {
  // 转置逻辑
} else {
  // 直接显示原始表格
}
```

这样：
- 10列 x 2行 → 转置为 2列 x 10行
- 2列 x 10行 → 保持原样，不转置

1. 这个理解是否正确？
2. 是否按此方案修改代码？

```markdown
| 指标 | 值 |
|---|---:|
| 总笔数 | 1 |
| 已合规笔数 | 0 |
| 不合规笔数 | 1 |
| ... (共10行) |
```

```typescript
// 只有当列数 > 行数时才转置
if (tableData.length > 0 && tableData[0].length > tableData.length) {
  // 转置逻辑
} else {
  // 直接显示原始表格
}
```
