```typescriptreact
          outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
          documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
          scrollX: window.scrollX,
          scrollY: window.scrollY,
        },
        rootContainer: rootRect ? {
          left: rootRect.left,
          top: rootRect.top,
          right: rootRect.right,
          bottom: rootRect.bottom,
          width: rootRect.width,
          height: rootRect.height,
        } : null,
        sidebar: sidebarRect ? {
          left: sidebarRect.left,
          top: sidebarRect.top,
          right: sidebarRect.right,
          bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
          width: sidebarRect.width,
          height: sidebarRect.height,
        } : null,
      }
      
      console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - BEFORE Adding Items:", beforeValues)
    }
    // 使用传入的 targetGridSpaceId，如果没有则使用 currentGridSpaceId
    const spaceId = targetGridSpaceId || currentGridSpaceId
    if (!spaceId) {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "No grid space selected",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return
    }
    try {
      // Get complete application information
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

      // Filter disk children - exclude questionnaire type disks
      const disks = completeApp.children?.filter(
        (child) => child.node_type === "disk" && child.category !== "questionnaire"
      ) || []

      // Process disks - save full disk object, only save latestResultId
      const disksWithResults = await Promise.all(
        disks.map(async (disk) => {
          // Handle dashboard type disks - parse requirement to dashboardCharts
          if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
            try {
              // Parse requirement field for dashboard charts
              if (disk.requirement) {
                try {
                  const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                  if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                    // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
                    const dashboardCharts = charts
                      .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
                      .map((chart: any) => ({
                        chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                        question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                        echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                        echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                        queries: chart.queries,
                        data_source: chart.data_source,
                        created_at: chart.created_at,
                        pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                        pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
                      }))

                    if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
                      // Save full disk object with parsed dashboardCharts
                      return {
                        ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
                        latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
                        dashboardCharts,
                        dashboardError: undefined,
                      }
                    } else {
                      return {
                        ...disk,
                        latestResultId: null,
                        dashboardCharts: undefined,
                        dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
                      }
                    }
                  } else {
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      latestResultId: null,
                      dashboardCharts: undefined,
                      dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
                    }
                  }
                } catch (parseError) {
                  console.error(
                    `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
                    parseError
                  )
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResultId: null,
                    dashboardCharts: undefined,
                    dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
                  }
                }
              } else {
                return {
                  ...disk,
                  latestResultId: null,
                  dashboardCharts: undefined,
                  dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
                }
              }
            } catch (error) {
              console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
              return {
                ...disk,
                latestResultId: null,
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
              }
            }
          }

          // Handle regular disks (non-dashboard) - save latestResultId and fill latestResult for display
          try {
            const executionResults = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(disk.id)
            const latestResult =
              executionResults && executionResults.length > 0
                ? executionResults.sort(
                    (a: any, b: any) =>
                      new Date(b.created_at).getTime() -
                      new Date(a.created_at).getTime()
                  )[0]
                : null

            // Save full disk object, save latestResultId for persistence, fill latestResult for immediate display
            return {
              ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
              latestResultId: latestResult ? latestResult.id : null, // Save ID for persistence
              latestResult: latestResult
                ? {
                    id: latestResult.id,
                    product_agent_id: latestResult.product_agent_id ?? null,
                    graph_id:
                      latestResult.graph_id !== undefined && latestResult.graph_id !== null
                        ? String(latestResult.graph_id)
                        : null,
                    is_processed: latestResult.is_processed,
                    conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                    created_at: latestResult.created_at,
                    updated_at: latestResult.updated_at,
                  }
                : null,
            }
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Failed to fetch execution results for disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResultId: null,
              latestResult: null,
            }
          }
        })
      )

      // Get current layout for collision detection (use lg breakpoint)
      const currentLayout = layouts.lg || []
      const cols = GRID_CONFIG.cols.lg

      // Create a separate grid item for each disk
      const newItems: GridItemData[] = []
      const newLayoutItems: { [key: string]: LayoutItem } = {}
      let currentX = Math.max(0, gridX)
      let currentY = Math.max(0, gridY)

      for (let i = 0; i < disksWithResults.length; i++) {
        const disk = disksWithResults[i]
        
        // Find next available position for this disk
        const { x: finalX, y: finalY } = findNextAvailablePosition(
          currentX,
          currentY,
          currentLayout,
          cols,
          DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h
        )

        // Create grid item for this disk (disks array contains only this one disk)
        const itemId = `grid-item-${Date.now()}-${i}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
        const newItem: GridItemData = {
          i: itemId,
          x: finalX,
          y: finalY,
          w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
          minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
          minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
          maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
          maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
          applicationId: completeApp.id,
          applicationName: completeApp.name,
          applicationDescription: completeApp.description,
          applicationCreator: completeApp.owner
            ? completeApp.owner.full_name || completeApp.owner.email
            : undefined,
          disks: [disk], // Each grid item contains only one disk
          isPinned: false, // Default to unpinned
          isExpanded: true, // Default to expanded state
        }

        newItems.push(newItem)

        // Prepare layout items for all breakpoints
        Object.keys(GRID_CONFIG.cols).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const breakpointCols = GRID_CONFIG.cols[breakpoint as keyof typeof GRID_CONFIG.cols]
          const proportionalX = Math.floor((finalX / cols) * breakpointCols)
          const layoutKey = `${breakpoint}-${itemId}`
          newLayoutItems[layoutKey] = {
            i: itemId,
            x: Math.max(0, Math.min(proportionalX, breakpointCols - DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w)),
            y: finalY,
            w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
            h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
            minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
            minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
            maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
            maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
          }
        })

        // Update current position for next disk (place next disk to the right, wrap if needed)
        currentX = finalX + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w
        if (currentX + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w > cols) {
          currentX = 0
          currentY = finalY + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h
        }
        // Update currentLayout to include this new item for collision detection
        currentLayout.push({
          i: itemId,
          x: finalX,
          y: finalY,
          w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
        })
      }

      // Add all new items to grid items
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        newItems.forEach((item) => {
          next.set(item.i, item)
        })
        return next
      })

      // Update layouts for all breakpoints
      setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
        const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
        Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
          const breakpointLayoutItems = newItems.map((item) => {
            const layoutKey = `${breakpoint}-${item.i}`
            return newLayoutItems[layoutKey]
          })
          newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = [
            ...existingLayout,
            ...breakpointLayoutItems,
          ]
        })
        return newLayouts
      })

      // Auto-scroll to the first new item after a short delay
      if (newItems.length > 0) {
        setTimeout(() => {
          scrollToItem(newItems[0].i)
        }, 100)
      }

      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button

      // Log dimensions after adding items (delayed to avoid interfering with drag-drop)
      // Use try-catch and delay to ensure drag-drop completes first
      setTimeout(() => {
        try {
          if (gridLayoutContainerRef.current) {
            const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = container.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            // Get root and sidebar info
            let rootRect = null
            let sidebarRect = null
            try {
              const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
              const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
              if (root) rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect()
              if (sidebar) sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
            } catch (e) {
              // Ignore errors
            }
            
            const afterValues = {
              newItemsCount: newItems.length,
              totalItemsCount: gridItems.size + newItems.length,
              container: {
                offsetWidth: container.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: container.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: container.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: {
                  left: containerRect.left,
                  top: containerRect.top,
                  right: containerRect.right,
                  bottom: containerRect.bottom,
                  width: containerRect.width,
                  height: containerRect.height,
                },
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
              document: {
                scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
                scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
                bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
                bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
              },
              window: {
                innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
                outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
                documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
                scrollX: window.scrollX,
                scrollY: window.scrollY,
              },
              rootContainer: rootRect ? {
                left: rootRect.left,
                top: rootRect.top,
                right: rootRect.right,
                bottom: rootRect.bottom,
                width: rootRect.width,
                height: rootRect.height,
              } : null,
              sidebar: sidebarRect ? {
                left: sidebarRect.left,
                top: sidebarRect.top,
                right: sidebarRect.right,
                bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
                width: sidebarRect.width,
                height: sidebarRect.height,
              } : null,
            }
            
            console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - AFTER Adding Items:", afterValues)
            
            // Calculate differences for key values
            if (beforeValues) {
              const differences: any = {}
              
              // Container boundingRect.left difference
              if (beforeValues.container?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined && afterValues.container?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.containerLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                  after: afterValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                  diff: afterValues.container.boundingRect.left - beforeValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Parent boundingRect.left difference
              if (beforeValues.parent?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined && afterValues.parent?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.parentLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                  after: afterValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                  diff: afterValues.parent.boundingRect.left - beforeValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Root container left difference
              if (beforeValues.rootContainer?.left !== undefined && afterValues.rootContainer?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.rootLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.rootContainer.left,
                  after: afterValues.rootContainer.left,
                  diff: afterValues.rootContainer.left - beforeValues.rootContainer.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Sidebar left difference
              if (beforeValues.sidebar?.left !== undefined && afterValues.sidebar?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.sidebarLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.sidebar.left,
                  after: afterValues.sidebar.left,
                  diff: afterValues.sidebar.left - beforeValues.sidebar.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Document scrollLeft difference
              if (beforeValues.document?.scrollLeft !== undefined && afterValues.document?.scrollLeft !== undefined) {
                differences.documentScrollLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.document.scrollLeft,
                  after: afterValues.document.scrollLeft,
                  diff: afterValues.document.scrollLeft - beforeValues.document.scrollLeft,
                }
              }
              
              // Window scrollX difference
              if (beforeValues.window?.scrollX !== undefined && afterValues.window?.scrollX !== undefined) {
                differences.windowScrollX = {
                  before: beforeValues.window.scrollX,
                  after: afterValues.window.scrollX,
                  diff: afterValues.window.scrollX - beforeValues.window.scrollX,
                }
              }
              
              // Container width difference
              if (beforeValues.container?.offsetWidth !== undefined && afterValues.container?.offsetWidth !== undefined) {
                differences.containerWidth = {
                  before: beforeValues.container.offsetWidth,
                  after: afterValues.container.offsetWidth,
                  diff: afterValues.container.offsetWidth - beforeValues.container.offsetWidth,
                }
              }
              
              console.log("🔍 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - DIFFERENCES (BEFORE vs AFTER):", differences)
            }
            
            // Query DOM elements after delay to avoid interfering with drag-drop
            setTimeout(() => {
              try {
                const rgl = container.querySelector('.react-grid-layout') as HTMLElement
                const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
                const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
                
                console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - AFTER Adding Items (DOM Queries):", {
                  reactGridLayout: rgl ? {
                    offsetWidth: rgl.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: rgl.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: rgl.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: rgl.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: rgl.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: rgl.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                  rootContainer: root ? {
                    offsetWidth: root.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: root.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: root.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: root.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: root.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: root.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                  sidebar: sidebar ? {
                    offsetWidth: sidebar.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: sidebar.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: sidebar.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: sidebar.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: sidebar.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: sidebar.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                })
              } catch (error) {
                console.warn("📐 [AIGridLayout] Error querying DOM after drop:", error)
              }
            }, 200) // Additional delay for DOM queries
          }
        } catch (error) {
          console.warn("📐 [AIGridLayout] Error logging dimensions after drop:", error)
        }
      }, 100) // Wait for React to update DOM

      toast({
        title: "Application Added",
        description: `${completeApp.name} with ${disks.length} disk(s) added to grid (${newItems.length} grid items created)`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
      console.log("🎯 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - END")
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to add application to grid:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to grid",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast, currentGridSpaceId])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const [{ isOver }, drop] = useDrop(() => ({
    accept: "application",
    drop: async (item: { application: any }) => {
      console.log("🎯 Drop event triggered:", { item, currentGridSpaceId })
      
      // 如果没有选中的 Grid Space，自动创建一个
      let targetGridSpaceId = currentGridSpaceId
      if (!targetGridSpaceId && onCreateGridSpace) {
        console.log("🚀 No grid space, creating new one...")
        const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
        if (newId) {
          targetGridSpaceId = newId
          onGridSpaceCreated?.(newId)
          console.log("✅ Grid space created:", newId)
        } else {
          console.log("❌ Failed to create grid space")
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Failed to create grid space for dropping application",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }
      } else if (!targetGridSpaceId) {
        console.log("⚠️ No grid space and no create function")
        toast({
          title: "No Grid Space",
          description: "Please create or select a grid space first",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Use a default position if we can't calculate from drop
      const gridX = 0
      const gridY = 0

      // 使用临时变量确保 handleApplicationDrop 使用正确的 ID
      const tempGridSpaceId = targetGridSpaceId
      console.log("📦 Calling handleApplicationDrop with:", tempGridSpaceId)
      await handleApplicationDrop(item.application, gridX, gridY, tempGridSpaceId)
    },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isOver: monitor.isOver(),
    }),
  }), [currentGridSpaceId, handleApplicationDrop, onCreateGridSpace, onGridSpaceCreated, toast])

  // Handle layout change
  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    (newLayouts: Layout[], allLayouts: Layouts) => {
      console.log("🔄 [AIGridLayout] handleLayoutChange called:", {
        newLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(newLayouts),
        allLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(allLayouts),
        lgItems: allLayouts.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static, x: item.x, y: item.y })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })

      
      // Preserve static property from processedLayouts when layout changes
      const layoutsWithStatic: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(allLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = allLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        layoutsWithStatic[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
          return {
            ...layoutItem,
            static: isPinned, // Preserve static property based on isPinned
          }
        })
      })
      
      console.log("💾 Updating layouts with preserved static:", {
        lgItems: layoutsWithStatic.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static }))
      })
      
      setLayouts(layoutsWithStatic)
      onLayoutChange?.(layoutsWithStatic)
      
      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
    },
    [onLayoutChange, gridItems]
  )

  // Handle toggle pin state
  const handleTogglePin = useCallback(
    (itemId: string) => {
      console.log("🔒 handleTogglePin called:", { itemId, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() })
      
      setGridItems((prevItems) => {
        const item = prevItems.get(itemId)
        console.log("📦 Current item state:", { itemId, item, isPinned: item?.isPinned })
        
        if (!item) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Item not found:", itemId)
          return prevItems
        }

        const newIsPinned = !(item.isPinned || false)
        console.log("🔄 Toggling pin state:", { itemId, oldIsPinned: item.isPinned, newIsPinned })
        
        const updatedItem = { ...item, isPinned: newIsPinned }
        const updatedItems = new Map(prevItems)
        updatedItems.set(itemId, updatedItem)
        
        console.log("✅ Updated gridItems:", { 
          itemId, 
          updatedItem: updatedItems.get(itemId),
          totalItems: updatedItems.size 
        })

        // Update layouts to set static property based on pin state
        setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
          console.log("📐 Updating layouts with static property:", { itemId, newIsPinned })
          
          const updatedLayouts: Layouts = {}
          Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
            const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
            updatedLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = existingLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
              if (layoutItem.i === itemId) {
                const updatedLayoutItem = {
                  ...layoutItem,
                  static: newIsPinned, // Set static based on pin state
                }
                console.log(`  📍 ${breakpoint}: Updated layout item:`, updatedLayoutItem)
                return updatedLayoutItem
              }
              return layoutItem
            })
          })

          // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
          return updatedLayouts
        })

        return updatedItems
      })
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId]
  )

  // Generate processed layouts with static property based on isPinned state
  // This ensures ResponsiveGridLayout receives layouts with correct static values
  const processedLayouts = useMemo(() => {
    console.log("🔄 Recalculating processedLayouts:", { 
      layoutsCount: Object.keys(layouts).length,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      gridItemsKeys: Array.from(gridItems.keys())
    })
    
    const processed: Layouts = {}
    const breakpoints: (keyof Layouts)[] = ['lg', 'md', 'sm', 'xs', 'xxs']
    
    breakpoints.forEach((breakpoint) => {
      const baseLayout = layouts[breakpoint] || []
      processed[breakpoint] = baseLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
        const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
        const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
        
        const processedItem = {
          ...layoutItem,
          static: isPinned, // Set static based on pin state
        }
        
        if (isPinned) {
          console.log(`  📌 ${breakpoint} - Item ${layoutItem.i} is pinned, static=true`)
        }
        
        return processedItem
      })
    })
    
    console.log("✅ Processed layouts result:", {
      lg: processed.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static })),
      gridItems: Array.from(gridItems.entries()).map(([key, value]) => ({ 
        i: key, 
        isPinned: value.isPinned 
      }))
    })
    
    return processed
  }, [layouts, gridItems])

  // Generate layout items for current breakpoint (default to lg) for rendering
  const currentLayout = useMemo(() => {
    return processedLayouts.lg || []
  }, [processedLayouts])

  // Auto-scroll to a specific item
  const scrollToItem = useCallback((itemId: string) => {
    if (!gridContainerRef.current) return
    
    // Find the item element by data-grid attribute
    const itemElement = gridContainerRef.current.querySelector(`[data-grid][data-key="${itemId}"]`) as HTMLElement
    if (!itemElement) {
      // Try alternative selector
      const altElement = gridContainerRef.current.querySelector(`[data-grid]`) as HTMLElement
      if (altElement) {
        altElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center", inline: "center" })
      }
      return
    }

    // Scroll to the item with smooth behavior
    itemElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center", inline: "center" })
  }, [])


  // Combined ref for both drop target and scroll container
  const combinedRef = React.useCallback((node: HTMLDivElement | null) => {
    // Store ref for scroll operations
    gridContainerRef.current = node
    // Apply drop ref
    if (node && typeof drop === 'function') {
      drop(node)
    }
  }, [drop])

  // Handle grid selection
  const handleGridSelect = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setSelectedGridId(gridId)
  }, [])

  // Handle clicking outside to deselect
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (!gridContainerRef.current) return
      
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      
      // Exclude toolbar clicks - don't deselect when clicking on toolbar
      if (target.closest('[data-toolbar]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Exclude sidebar clicks - don't deselect when clicking on sidebar
      if (target.closest('[data-sidebar]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Exclude modal clicks - don't deselect when clicking on modal
      if (target.closest('[data-modal]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Check if click is outside grid container
      if (!gridContainerRef.current.contains(target)) {
        setSelectedGridId(null)
        if (!editingLockId) {
          setEditingGridId(null)
        }
        return
      }

      // Check if click is on a grid item or its children
      const gridItem = target.closest('[data-grid-item]')
      if (!gridItem) {
        setSelectedGridId(null)
        if (!editingLockId) {
          setEditingGridId(null)
        }
      }
    }

    if (isEditMode) {
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
      return () => {
        document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
      }
    }
  }, [isEditMode, editingLockId])

  // Clear selections when exiting edit mode (if external state changes)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode) {
      setSelectedGridId(null)
      if (!editingLockId) {
        setEditingGridId(null)
      }
    }
  }, [isEditMode, editingLockId])

  // Handle grid edit request
  const handleGridEdit = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setEditingGridId(gridId)
    setEditingLockId(gridId)
    setSelectedGridId(gridId)
  }, [])

  // Get disk info for sidebar
  const editingDiskInfo = useMemo(() => {
    if (!editingGridId) return null
    const gridItem = gridItems.get(editingGridId)
    if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) return null
    const disk = gridItem.disks[0] // Each grid item contains only one disk
    return {
      diskId: disk.id,
      diskName: disk.name,
    }
  }, [editingGridId, gridItems])
  const isDiskSidebarOpen = !!editingDiskInfo

  const previousOverflowRef = useRef<{ body: string; html: string }>({ body: '', html: '' })

  useEffect(() => {
    const body = document.body
    const html = document.documentElement

    if (isDiskSidebarOpen) {
      previousOverflowRef.current = {
        body: body.style.overflowY,
        html: html.style.overflowY,
      }
      body.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
      html.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
    } else {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }

    return () => {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }
  }, [isDiskSidebarOpen])

  // Handle grid delete
  const handleGridDelete = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setGridItems((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      next.delete(gridId)
      return next
    })
    setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
      const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.filter((item) => item.i !== gridId)
      })
      return newLayouts
    })
    setSelectedGridId(null)
    if (!editingLockId || editingLockId === gridId) {
      setEditingGridId(null)
      setEditingLockId(null)
    }
    toast({
      title: "Deleted",
      description: "Grid item deleted",
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast])

  const handleTextEditChange = useCallback(
    ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => {
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.set(gridItemId, { diskId, markdown })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, onUnsavedChange]
  )

  const handleTextEditCommit = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => {
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(gridItemId)
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== diskId) {
            return disk
          }
          if (!disk.latestResult) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResult: {
              ...disk.latestResult,
              conclusion_detail: markdown,
              updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (!updatedItems) {
        return
      }

      try {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
        pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save text edit:", error)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
        if (currentGridSpaceId) {
          onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
        }
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save text changes. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, onUnsavedChange, saveGridSpaceData, toast]
  )

  // Handle grid cut
  const [runModalState, setRunModalState] = useState<{
    isOpen: boolean
    gridItemId: string | null
    disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | null
  }>({
    isOpen: false,
    gridItemId: null,
    disk: null,
  })

  // Helper function to parse dashboard requirement
  const parseDashboardRequirement = useCallback((disk: any) => {
    try {
      if (disk.category === "dashboard" && disk.requirement) {
        try {
          const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
          if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
            // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
            const dashboardCharts = charts
              .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
              .map((chart: any) => ({
                chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                queries: chart.queries,
                data_source: chart.data_source,
                created_at: chart.created_at,
                pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
              }))

            if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
              return {
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError: undefined,
              }
            } else {
              return {
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
              }
            }
          } else {
            return {
              dashboardCharts: undefined,
              dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.error(
            `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
            parseError
          )
          return {
            dashboardCharts: undefined,
            dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
          }
        }
      } else {
        return {
          dashboardCharts: undefined,
          dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
      return {
        dashboardCharts: undefined,
        dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const handleRefreshDisk = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => {
      try {
        // Get current disk info to check its category
        const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
        if (!currentItem) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Grid item not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        const currentDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
        if (!currentDisk) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Disk not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
        if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
          // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
          const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)

          // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
          const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

          // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
          setGridItems((prev) => {
            const next = new Map(prev)
            const item = next.get(gridItemId)
            if (!item) {
              return prev
            }

            const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
              if (disk.id !== diskId) {
                return disk
              }
              return {
                ...disk,
                ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError,
                latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
              }
            })

            const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
              ...item,
              disks: updatedDisks,
            }
            next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
            return next
          })

          toast({
            title: "Refreshed",
            description: "Dashboard charts have been refreshed with the latest configuration.",
            status: "success",
            duration: 2000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
        const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
        
        if (!results || results.length === 0) {
          toast({
            title: "No results found",
            description: "This disk does not have any execution results yet.",
            status: "info",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Get the latest result (first one in the array, as they are sorted by created_at desc)
        const latestResult = results[0]

        // Update gridItems with the new latestResult
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(gridItemId)
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== diskId) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResult,
              latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
          return next
        })

        toast({
          title: "Refreshed",
          description: "Disk result has been refreshed with the latest data.",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error: any) {
        console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Refresh Failed",
          description: error.message || "Failed to refresh disk. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [toast, gridItems, parseDashboardRequirement]
  )

  const handleRun = useCallback(
    (gridItemId: string) => {
      const gridItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) {
        toast({
          title: "No disk available",
          description: "This grid item does not have a disk to run.",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }
      const disk = gridItem.disks[0]
      setRunModalState({
        isOpen: true,
        gridItemId,
        disk,
      })
    },
    [gridItems, toast]
  )

  const handleRunModalClose = useCallback(() => {
    setRunModalState((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      isOpen: false,
    }))
  }, [])

  const handleRunCompleted = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!runModalState.gridItemId || !runModalState.disk) {
      return
    }
    try {
      const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(runModalState.disk.id)
      const latestResult = results[0] ?? null
      if (!latestResult) {
        return
      }

      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== runModalState.disk?.id) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            latestResult,
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (updatedItems) {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to refresh after run:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Refresh Failed",
        description: "Failed to refresh disk results after running.",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [runModalState.disk, runModalState.gridItemId, saveGridSpaceData, toast])

  console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout RETURN - About to render JSX, isEditMode:", isEditMode)

  return (
    <>
      {/* Disk Properties Sidebar */}
      {editingDiskInfo && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="fixed"
            top={0}
            left={0}
            right="400px"
            bottom={0}
            bg="rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
            zIndex={900}
            onClick={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
          <AIGridDiskSidebar
            diskId={editingDiskInfo.diskId}
            diskName={editingDiskInfo.diskName}
            isOpen={true}
            onClose={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
        </>
      )}
      
      <Box
        ref={combinedRef}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        border={isOver ? "2px dashed" : "none"}
        borderColor={isOver ? "blue.500" : "transparent"}
        overflow="hidden"
        bg="#ffffff"
        sx={{
          // Grid background pattern using pseudo-elements to avoid Chakra UI conflicts
          // This ensures both horizontal and vertical lines are displayed
          position: 'relative',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          '&::before': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Horizontal lines (to bottom)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '100% 15px',
          },
          '&::after': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Vertical lines (to right)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '15px 100%',
          },
        }}
      >

      
      <Box
        ref={(node) => {
          gridLayoutContainerRef.current = node
          // Log when ref is set
          if (node) {
            const nodeRect = node.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = node.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            console.log("🔗 [AIGridLayout] gridLayoutContainerRef - SET:", {
              offsetWidth: node.offsetWidth,
              clientWidth: node.clientWidth,
              scrollWidth: node.scrollWidth,
              offsetLeft: node.offsetLeft,
              scrollLeft: node.scrollLeft,
              boundingRect: {
                left: nodeRect.left,
                top: nodeRect.top,
                right: nodeRect.right,
                bottom: nodeRect.bottom,
                width: nodeRect.width,
                height: nodeRect.height,
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
            })
          }
        }}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        zIndex={1}
        flexShrink={0}
        flexGrow={0}
        sx={{
          // Ensure the container doesn't expand beyond parent
          boxSizing: 'border-box',
          // Prevent horizontal scrolling from causing layout shift
          overflowX: 'hidden',
          overflowY: isEditMode ? 'hidden' : 'auto',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          // Force width to be exactly 100% of parent, no more
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
        }}
      >
      <ResponsiveGridLayout
        className="layout"
        layouts={processedLayouts}
        breakpoints={{ lg: 1200, md: 996, sm: 768, xs: 480, xxs: 0 }}
        cols={GRID_CONFIG.cols}
        rowHeight={GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight}
        margin={GRID_CONFIG.margin}
        containerPadding={GRID_CONFIG.containerPadding}
        onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
        isDraggable={true}
        isResizable={true}
        resizeHandles={["se", "sw", "ne", "nw", "s", "n", "e", "w"]}
        compactType={null}
        draggableHandle=".grid-drag-handle"
      >
        {currentLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          if (!itemData) return null

          console.log("📦 Rendering AIGridItem:", {
            itemId: layoutItem.i,
            hasOnTogglePin: !!handleTogglePin,
            isPinned: itemData.isPinned,
            static: layoutItem.static
          })

          return (
            <Box 
              key={layoutItem.i} 
              data-grid={layoutItem} 
              data-key={layoutItem.i}
              data-grid-item={layoutItem.i}
            >
              <AIGridItem 
                data={itemData} 
                onTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
                isEditMode={isEditMode}
                isSelected={selectedGridId === layoutItem.i}
                onSelect={() => handleGridSelect(layoutItem.i)}
                onEdit={() => handleGridEdit(layoutItem.i)}
                onDelete={() => handleGridDelete(layoutItem.i)}
                onRun={() => handleRun(layoutItem.i)}
                onTextEditChange={handleTextEditChange}
                onTextEditCommit={handleTextEditCommit}
                onRefreshDisk={handleRefreshDisk}
              />
            </Box>
          )
        })}
      </ResponsiveGridLayout>
      {runModalState.disk && (
        <AIGridRunModal
          isOpen={runModalState.isOpen}
          disk={runModalState.disk}
          onClose={handleRunModalClose}
          onCompleted={handleRunCompleted}
        />
      )}
      </Box>
    </Box>
    </>
  )
}

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from "react"
import { Responsive, WidthProvider } from "react-grid-layout"
import type { Layout, Layouts } from "react-grid-layout"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { AIGridItem } from "./AIGridItem"
import { AIGridDiskSidebar } from "./AIGridDiskSidebar"
import { AIGridRunModal } from "./AIGridRunModal"
import { GridItemData, LayoutItem } from "./types"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { GridSpaceService } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import "react-grid-layout/css/styles.css"
import "react-resizable/css/styles.css"

const ResponsiveGridLayout = WidthProvider(Responsive)

const EMPTY_LAYOUTS: Layouts = {
  lg: [],
  md: [],
  sm: [],
  xs: [],
  xxs: [],
}

const normalizeLayouts = (layouts?: Layouts | null): Layouts => {
  const normalized: Layouts = {
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  }
  if (!layouts) {
    return normalized
  }

  (Object.keys(normalized) as (keyof Layouts)[]).forEach((breakpoint) => {
    const breakpointLayout = layouts[breakpoint]
    if (Array.isArray(breakpointLayout)) {
      normalized[breakpoint] = breakpointLayout
    }
  })

  return normalized
}

interface AIGridLayoutProps {
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onLayoutChange?: (layouts: Layouts) => void
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onGridSpaceCreated?: (gridSpaceId: string) => void // 当 Grid Space 创建后调用
  onUnsavedChange?: (gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => void // 通知未保存状态变化
  onSaveRequest?: (saveFunction: () => Promise<void>) => void // 注册保存函数
  isEditMode?: boolean // 编辑模式状态（从父组件传入）
  onEditModeToggle?: () => void // 编辑模式切换回调
}

// 默认网格配置
const GRID_CONFIG = {
  cols: { lg: 12, md: 10, sm: 6, xs: 4, xxs: 2 },
  rowHeight: 100,
  containerPadding: [16, 16] as [number, number],
  margin: [16, 16] as [number, number],
}

// 默认网格项大小（建议：宽4列，高4行）
const DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE = {
  w: 4,
  h: 4,
  minW: 3,
  minH: 3,
  maxW: 8,
  maxH: 8,
}

// 碰撞检测函数：检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
const checkCollision = (
  x: number,
  y: number,
  w: number,
  h: number,
  existingItems: Layout[]
): boolean => {
  for (const item of existingItems) {
    // 检查是否重叠
    if (
      x < item.x + item.w &&
      x + w > item.x &&
      y < item.y + item.h &&
      y + h > item.y
    ) {
      return true // 有碰撞
    }
  }
  return false // 无碰撞
}

// 智能位置查找函数：优先横向排列，如果冲突则向下查找
const findNextAvailablePosition = (
  preferredX: number,
  preferredY: number,
  existingItems: Layout[],
  cols: number,
  itemWidth: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
  itemHeight: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
  maxAttempts: number = 50
): { x: number; y: number } => {
  // 首先尝试使用首选位置
  if (!checkCollision(preferredX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
    return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
  }

  // 优先尝试横向排列（向右查找）
  for (let offset = 1; offset <= cols - itemWidth; offset++) {
    const tryX = preferredX + offset
    if (tryX + itemWidth <= cols) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: preferredY }
      }
    }
  }

  // 如果横向排列失败，向下查找
  let tryY = preferredY
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxAttempts; attempt++) {
    // 尝试在当前行找到位置
    for (let tryX = 0; tryX <= cols - itemWidth; tryX++) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, tryY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: tryY }
      }
    }
    // 如果当前行没有位置，向下移动一行
    tryY += itemHeight
  }

  // 如果所有尝试都失败，返回首选位置（让 react-grid-layout 处理）
  return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
}

export const AIGridLayout: React.FC<AIGridLayoutProps> = ({
  currentGridSpaceId,
  onLayoutChange,
  onCreateGridSpace,
  onGridSpaceCreated,
  onUnsavedChange,
  onSaveRequest,
  isEditMode: externalIsEditMode,
  onEditModeToggle,
}) => {
  const toast = useToast()
  const gridContainerRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const [gridItems, setGridItems] = useState<Map<string, GridItemData>>(new Map())
  const [layouts, setLayouts] = useState<Layouts>({
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  })
  const [lastSavedData, setLastSavedData] = useState<string | null>(null) // 记录最后保存的数据
  const [hasUnsavedChanges, setHasUnsavedChanges] = useState(false) // 未保存状态
  const [gridMetadata, setGridMetadata] = useState<Record<string, any>>({})
  const [connectionList, setConnectionList] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [groupStructure, setGroupStructure] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [viewportState, setViewportState] = useState<Record<string, any>>({})
  const [layoutVersion, setLayoutVersion] = useState<number>(1)
  const buildPersistencePayload = useCallback(
    (
      itemsMap: Map<string, GridItemData>,
      layoutsSnapshot: Layouts,
      overrides?: {
        canvasMetadata?: Record<string, any>
        connectionList?: any[]
        groupStructure?: any[]
        viewportState?: Record<string, any>
        layoutVersion?: number
      }
    ) => {
      const layoutsWithoutStatic: Layouts = {}
      const layoutKeys = Object.keys(EMPTY_LAYOUTS) as (keyof Layouts)[]
      layoutKeys.forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = layoutsSnapshot?.[breakpoint]
        const normalizedLayout = Array.isArray(layout) ? layout : []
        layoutsWithoutStatic[breakpoint] = normalizedLayout.map(({ static: _static, ...rest }) => rest)
      })

      const itemsToSave = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).map((item) => ({
        ...item,
        disks: item.disks?.map((disk) => {
          const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
          if (!latestResult) {
            return diskWithoutResult
          }
          return {
            ...diskWithoutResult,
            latestResult: {
              id: latestResult.id,
              product_agent_id: latestResult.product_agent_id ?? null,
              graph_id:
                latestResult.graph_id !== undefined && latestResult.graph_id !== null
                  ? String(latestResult.graph_id)
                  : null,
              is_processed: latestResult.is_processed ?? false,
              conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail ?? "",
              created_at: latestResult.created_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
              updated_at: latestResult.updated_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          }
        }),
      }))

      const metadataSource = overrides?.canvasMetadata ?? gridMetadata
      const payloadMetadata = {
        ...(metadataSource || {}),
        layouts: layoutsWithoutStatic,
      }

      const payload = {
        node_list: itemsToSave,
        canvas_metadata: payloadMetadata,
        connection_list: overrides?.connectionList ?? connectionList,
        group_structure: overrides?.groupStructure ?? groupStructure,
        viewport_state: overrides?.viewportState ?? viewportState,
        layout_version: overrides?.layoutVersion ?? layoutVersion,
      }

      return {
        payload,
        baselineString: JSON.stringify(payload),
        metadata: payloadMetadata,
      }
    },
    [gridMetadata, connectionList, groupStructure, viewportState, layoutVersion]
  )
  // 使用外部传入的编辑模式状态，如果没有则使用内部状态
  const isEditMode = externalIsEditMode ?? false
  const [selectedGridId, setSelectedGridId] = useState<string | null>(null) // 选中的 grid ID
  const [editingGridId, setEditingGridId] = useState<string | null>(null) // 正在编辑的 grid ID (for sidebar)
  const [editingLockId, setEditingLockId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const gridLayoutContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null) // Ref for ResponsiveGridLayout container
  const pendingTextEditsRef = useRef<Map<string, { diskId: number; markdown: string }>>(new Map())

  // Debug logging - More visible logging
  useEffect(() => {
    console.log("🎨 ===== AIGridLayout RENDERED =====")
    console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout state:", {
      isEditMode,
      selectedGridId,
      editingGridId,
      currentGridSpaceId,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      externalIsEditMode,
      hasOnEditModeToggle: !!onEditModeToggle,
    })
    console.log("🎨 ===== END AIGridLayout RENDER =====")
  }, [isEditMode, selectedGridId, editingGridId, currentGridSpaceId, gridItems.size, externalIsEditMode, onEditModeToggle])

  // Log when component first mounts
  useEffect(() => {
    console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout MOUNTED - Component initialized")
  }, [])

  // Monitor container width to ensure WidthProvider uses correct width
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!gridLayoutContainerRef.current) return

    const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
      for (const entry of entries) {
        void entry.contentRect

        // Force react-grid-layout to recalculate width
        // WidthProvider should automatically handle this, but we ensure it uses container width
        if (container) {
          // Trigger a resize event to notify WidthProvider
          window.dispatchEvent(new Event("resize"))
        }
      }
    })

    resizeObserver.observe(container)

    return () => {
      resizeObserver.disconnect()
    }
  }, [])

  // Load grid layout data from database
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId) {
      loadGridSpaceData(currentGridSpaceId)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    } else {
      // Clear grid items when no space is selected
      setGridItems(new Map())
      setLayouts({
        lg: [],
        md: [],
        sm: [],
        xs: [],
        xxs: [],
      })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId])

  const loadGridSpaceData = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      const gridSpace = await GridSpaceService.getGridSpace(gridSpaceId)

      let processedMetadata: Record<string, any>
      try {
        processedMetadata = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(gridSpace.canvas_metadata || {}))
      } catch {
        processedMetadata = { ...(gridSpace.canvas_metadata || {}) }
      }

      let nodeListRaw: GridItemData[] = Array.isArray(gridSpace.node_list)
        ? (gridSpace.node_list as GridItemData[])
        : []
      let layoutsSource: Layouts | null =
        (processedMetadata.layouts as Layouts | undefined) ?? null

      const legacySnapshot = processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data
      if (
        (!layoutsSource ||
          Object.values(layoutsSource).every(
            (value) => !Array.isArray(value) || value.length === 0,
          )) &&
        legacySnapshot
      ) {
        try {
          const legacyData =
            typeof legacySnapshot === "string"
              ? JSON.parse(legacySnapshot)
              : legacySnapshot
          if (legacyData && typeof legacyData === "object") {
            if (!layoutsSource && legacyData.layouts) {
              layoutsSource = legacyData.layouts as Layouts
            }
            if ((!nodeListRaw || nodeListRaw.length === 0) && Array.isArray(legacyData.items)) {
              nodeListRaw = legacyData.items as GridItemData[]
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.warn("Failed to parse legacy grid layout data:", parseError)
        }
      }

      const normalizedLayouts = normalizeLayouts(layoutsSource)
      processedMetadata.layouts = normalizedLayouts
      if (processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data) {
        delete processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data
      }

      const itemsMap = new Map<string, GridItemData>()
      const itemsArray: GridItemData[] = Array.isArray(nodeListRaw) ? nodeListRaw : []

      const resultIdsToLoad: number[] = []
      const diskIdToResultIdMap = new Map<number, number>()

      itemsArray.forEach((rawItem) => {
        if (!rawItem || typeof rawItem !== "object" || !rawItem.i) {
          return
        }
        const item = { ...rawItem }
        itemsMap.set(item.i, item)

        if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
          item.disks.forEach((disk) => {
            if (disk?.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
              resultIdsToLoad.push(disk.latestResultId)
              diskIdToResultIdMap.set(disk.id, disk.latestResultId)
            }
          })
        }
      })

      if (resultIdsToLoad.length > 0) {
        try {
          const diskIds = Array.from(
            new Set(
              itemsArray
                .flatMap((item) => item.disks?.map((disk) => disk.id) || [])
                .filter((id): id is number => typeof id === "number"),
            ),
          )

          const diskResultsPromises = diskIds.map(async (diskId) => {
            try {
              const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
              return { diskId, results }
            } catch (error) {
              console.error(`Failed to load results for disk ${diskId}:`, error)
              return { diskId, results: [] }
            }
          })

          const diskResultsArray = await Promise.all(diskResultsPromises)
          const diskResultsMap = new Map<number, any[]>(
            diskResultsArray.map(({ diskId, results }) => [diskId, results]),
          )

          itemsMap.forEach((item, itemId) => {
            if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
              // Filter out questionnaire type disks
              const filteredDisks = item.disks.filter(
                (disk) => disk && typeof disk === "object" && disk.category !== "questionnaire"
              )

              // If all disks are filtered out, remove the entire item
              if (filteredDisks.length === 0) {
                itemsMap.delete(itemId)
                return
              }

              const updatedDisks = filteredDisks.map((disk) => {
                if (!disk || typeof disk !== "object") {
                  return disk
                }
                if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
                  return disk
                }
                const latestResultId = disk.latestResultId ?? diskIdToResultIdMap.get(disk.id)
                if (!latestResultId) {
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResult: disk.latestResult ?? null,
                  }
                }
                const results = diskResultsMap.get(disk.id) || []
                const latestResult = results.find((r: any) => r.id === latestResultId) || null
                return {
                  ...disk,
                  latestResult,
                }
              })

              itemsMap.set(itemId, {
                ...item,
                disks: updatedDisks,
              })
            }
          })
        } catch (resultError) {
          console.error("Failed to batch load execution results:", resultError)
        }
      }

      setGridItems(itemsMap)
      setLayouts(normalizedLayouts)

      const processedConnectionList = Array.isArray(gridSpace.connection_list)
        ? gridSpace.connection_list
        : []
      const processedGroupStructure = Array.isArray(gridSpace.group_structure)
        ? gridSpace.group_structure
        : []
      const processedViewportState =
        gridSpace.viewport_state && typeof gridSpace.viewport_state === "object"
          ? gridSpace.viewport_state
          : {}
      const processedLayoutVersion =
        typeof gridSpace.layout_version === "number" ? gridSpace.layout_version : 1

      setConnectionList(processedConnectionList)
      setGroupStructure(processedGroupStructure)
      setViewportState(processedViewportState)
      setLayoutVersion(processedLayoutVersion)
      setGridMetadata(processedMetadata)

      const { baselineString } = buildPersistencePayload(itemsMap, normalizedLayouts, {
        canvasMetadata: processedMetadata,
        connectionList: processedConnectionList,
        groupStructure: processedGroupStructure,
        viewportState: processedViewportState,
        layoutVersion: processedLayoutVersion,
      })
      setLastSavedData(baselineString)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      onUnsavedChange?.(gridSpaceId, false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid space data:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid space data",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast, buildPersistencePayload, onUnsavedChange])

  // Save grid layout data to database (manual save)
  // Note: static property is a runtime property and should not be saved
  const saveGridSpaceData = useCallback(
    async (overrides?: { items?: Map<string, GridItemData>; layouts?: Layouts }) => {
      if (!currentGridSpaceId) {
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "No grid space selected",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      try {
        // Get current layouts and items
        const currentLayouts = overrides?.layouts ?? layouts
        const currentItems = overrides?.items ?? gridItems

        const { payload, baselineString, metadata } = buildPersistencePayload(
          currentItems,
          currentLayouts,
        )

        await GridSpaceService.autoSaveGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId, payload)

        setGridMetadata(metadata)
        setLastSavedData(baselineString)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, false)
        
        toast({
          title: "Saved",
          description: "Grid space saved successfully",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save grid space:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save grid space",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        throw error
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, toast, onUnsavedChange, buildPersistencePayload]
  )

  // Register save function with parent component
  useEffect(() => {
    if (onSaveRequest && currentGridSpaceId) {
      onSaveRequest(saveGridSpaceData)
    }
  }, [onSaveRequest, currentGridSpaceId, saveGridSpaceData])

  // Check for unsaved changes
  const checkUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentGridSpaceId) return

    const { baselineString } = buildPersistencePayload(gridItems, layouts)
    
    const hasChanges = lastSavedData !== baselineString
    if (hasChanges !== hasUnsavedChanges) {
      setHasUnsavedChanges(hasChanges)
      onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, hasChanges)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, hasUnsavedChanges, onUnsavedChange, buildPersistencePayload])

  // Check for unsaved changes whenever data changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId && lastSavedData !== null) {
      checkUnsavedChanges()
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, checkUnsavedChanges])

  const handleApplicationDrop = useCallback(async (
    application: any,
    gridX: number,
    gridY: number,
    targetGridSpaceId?: string | null
  ) => {
    console.log("🎯 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - START:", {
      application: application?.name,
      gridX,
      gridY,
      targetGridSpaceId,
      currentGridSpaceId,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    })

    // Log dimensions before adding items (simplified to avoid interfering with drag-drop)
    // Record key values for comparison
    let beforeValues: any = null
    if (gridLayoutContainerRef.current) {
      const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
      const parent = container.parentElement
      const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
      
      // Get root and sidebar info (safe queries, no interference)
      let rootRect = null
      let sidebarRect = null
      try {
        const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
        const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
        if (root) rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect()
        if (sidebar) sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
      } catch (e) {
        // Ignore errors during drag
      }
      
      beforeValues = {
        container: {
          offsetWidth: container.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: container.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: container.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: {
            left: containerRect.left,
            top: containerRect.top,
            right: containerRect.right,
            bottom: containerRect.bottom,
            width: containerRect.width,
            height: containerRect.height,
          },
        },
        parent: parent ? {
          offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: parentRect ? {
            left: parentRect.left,
            top: parentRect.top,
            right: parentRect.right,
            bottom: parentRect.bottom,
            width: parentRect.width,
            height: parentRect.height,
          } : null,
        } : null,
        document: {
          scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
          scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
          bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
          bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
        },
        window: {
          innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
          outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
          documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
          scrollX: window.scrollX,
          scrollY: window.scrollY,
        },
        rootContainer: rootRect ? {
          left: rootRect.left,
          top: rootRect.top,
          right: rootRect.right,
          bottom: rootRect.bottom,
          width: rootRect.width,
          height: rootRect.height,
        } : null,
        sidebar: sidebarRect ? {
          left: sidebarRect.left,
          top: sidebarRect.top,
          right: sidebarRect.right,
          bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
          width: sidebarRect.width,
          height: sidebarRect.height,
        } : null,
      }
      
      console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - BEFORE Adding Items:", beforeValues)
    }
    // 使用传入的 targetGridSpaceId，如果没有则使用 currentGridSpaceId
    const spaceId = targetGridSpaceId || currentGridSpaceId
    if (!spaceId) {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "No grid space selected",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return
    }
    try {
      // Get complete application information
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

      // Filter disk children - exclude questionnaire type disks
      const disks = completeApp.children?.filter(
        (child) => child.node_type === "disk" && child.category !== "questionnaire"
      ) || []

      // Process disks - save full disk object, only save latestResultId
      const disksWithResults = await Promise.all(
        disks.map(async (disk) => {
          // Handle dashboard type disks - parse requirement to dashboardCharts
          if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
            try {
              // Parse requirement field for dashboard charts
              if (disk.requirement) {
                try {
                  const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                  if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                    // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
                    const dashboardCharts = charts
                      .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
                      .map((chart: any) => ({
                        chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                        question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                        echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                        echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                        queries: chart.queries,
                        data_source: chart.data_source,
                        created_at: chart.created_at,
                        pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                        pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
                      }))

                    if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
                      // Save full disk object with parsed dashboardCharts
                      return {
                        ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
                        latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
                        dashboardCharts,
                        dashboardError: undefined,
                      }
                    } else {
                      return {
                        ...disk,
                        latestResultId: null,
                        dashboardCharts: undefined,
                        dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
                      }
                    }
                  } else {
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      latestResultId: null,
                      dashboardCharts: undefined,
                      dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
                    }
                  }
                } catch (parseError) {
                  console.error(
                    `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
                    parseError
                  )
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResultId: null,
                    dashboardCharts: undefined,
                    dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
                  }
                }
              } else {
                return {
                  ...disk,
                  latestResultId: null,
                  dashboardCharts: undefined,
                  dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
                }
              }
            } catch (error) {
              console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
              return {
                ...disk,
                latestResultId: null,
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
              }
            }
          }

          // Handle regular disks (non-dashboard) - save latestResultId and fill latestResult for display
          try {
            const executionResults = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(disk.id)
            const latestResult =
              executionResults && executionResults.length > 0
                ? executionResults.sort(
                    (a: any, b: any) =>
                      new Date(b.created_at).getTime() -
                      new Date(a.created_at).getTime()
                  )[0]
                : null

            // Save full disk object, save latestResultId for persistence, fill latestResult for immediate display
            return {
              ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
              latestResultId: latestResult ? latestResult.id : null, // Save ID for persistence
              latestResult: latestResult
                ? {
                    id: latestResult.id,
                    product_agent_id: latestResult.product_agent_id ?? null,
                    graph_id:
                      latestResult.graph_id !== undefined && latestResult.graph_id !== null
                        ? String(latestResult.graph_id)
                        : null,
                    is_processed: latestResult.is_processed,
                    conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                    created_at: latestResult.created_at,
                    updated_at: latestResult.updated_at,
                  }
                : null,
            }
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Failed to fetch execution results for disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResultId: null,
              latestResult: null,
            }
          }
        })
      )

      // Get current layout for collision detection (use lg breakpoint)
      const currentLayout = layouts.lg || []
      const cols = GRID_CONFIG.cols.lg

      // Create a separate grid item for each disk
```
