```typescriptreact
      const newItems: GridItemData[] = []
      const newLayoutItems: { [key: string]: LayoutItem } = {}
      let currentX = Math.max(0, gridX)
      let currentY = Math.max(0, gridY)

      for (let i = 0; i < disksWithResults.length; i++) {
        const disk = disksWithResults[i]
        
        // Find next available position for this disk
        const { x: finalX, y: finalY } = findNextAvailablePosition(
          currentX,
          currentY,
          currentLayout,
          cols,
          DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h
        )

        // Create grid item for this disk (disks array contains only this one disk)
        const itemId = `grid-item-${Date.now()}-${i}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
        const newItem: GridItemData = {
          i: itemId,
          x: finalX,
          y: finalY,
          w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
          minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
          minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
          maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
          maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
          applicationId: completeApp.id,
          applicationName: completeApp.name,
          applicationDescription: completeApp.description,
          applicationCreator: completeApp.owner
            ? completeApp.owner.full_name || completeApp.owner.email
            : undefined,
          disks: [disk], // Each grid item contains only one disk
          isPinned: false, // Default to unpinned
          isExpanded: true, // Default to expanded state
        }

        newItems.push(newItem)

        // Prepare layout items for all breakpoints
        Object.keys(GRID_CONFIG.cols).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const breakpointCols = GRID_CONFIG.cols[breakpoint as keyof typeof GRID_CONFIG.cols]
          const proportionalX = Math.floor((finalX / cols) * breakpointCols)
          const layoutKey = `${breakpoint}-${itemId}`
          newLayoutItems[layoutKey] = {
            i: itemId,
            x: Math.max(0, Math.min(proportionalX, breakpointCols - DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w)),
            y: finalY,
            w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
            h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
            minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
            minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
            maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
            maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
          }
        })

        // Update current position for next disk (place next disk to the right, wrap if needed)
        currentX = finalX + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w
        if (currentX + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w > cols) {
          currentX = 0
          currentY = finalY + DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h
        }
        // Update currentLayout to include this new item for collision detection
        currentLayout.push({
          i: itemId,
          x: finalX,
          y: finalY,
          w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
          h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
        })
      }

      // Add all new items to grid items
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        newItems.forEach((item) => {
          next.set(item.i, item)
        })
        return next
      })

      // Update layouts for all breakpoints
      setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
        const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
        Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
          const breakpointLayoutItems = newItems.map((item) => {
            const layoutKey = `${breakpoint}-${item.i}`
            return newLayoutItems[layoutKey]
          })
          newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = [
            ...existingLayout,
            ...breakpointLayoutItems,
          ]
        })
        return newLayouts
      })

      // Auto-scroll to the first new item after a short delay
      if (newItems.length > 0) {
        setTimeout(() => {
          scrollToItem(newItems[0].i)
        }, 100)
      }

      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button

      // Log dimensions after adding items (delayed to avoid interfering with drag-drop)
      // Use try-catch and delay to ensure drag-drop completes first
      setTimeout(() => {
        try {
          if (gridLayoutContainerRef.current) {
            const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = container.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            // Get root and sidebar info
            let rootRect = null
            let sidebarRect = null
            try {
              const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
              const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
              if (root) rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect()
              if (sidebar) sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
            } catch (e) {
              // Ignore errors
            }
            
            const afterValues = {
              newItemsCount: newItems.length,
              totalItemsCount: gridItems.size + newItems.length,
              container: {
                offsetWidth: container.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: container.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: container.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: {
                  left: containerRect.left,
                  top: containerRect.top,
                  right: containerRect.right,
                  bottom: containerRect.bottom,
                  width: containerRect.width,
                  height: containerRect.height,
                },
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
              document: {
                scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
                scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
                bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
                bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
              },
              window: {
                innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
                outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
                documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
                scrollX: window.scrollX,
                scrollY: window.scrollY,
              },
              rootContainer: rootRect ? {
                left: rootRect.left,
                top: rootRect.top,
                right: rootRect.right,
                bottom: rootRect.bottom,
                width: rootRect.width,
                height: rootRect.height,
              } : null,
              sidebar: sidebarRect ? {
                left: sidebarRect.left,
                top: sidebarRect.top,
                right: sidebarRect.right,
                bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
                width: sidebarRect.width,
                height: sidebarRect.height,
              } : null,
            }
            
            console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - AFTER Adding Items:", afterValues)
            
            // Calculate differences for key values
            if (beforeValues) {
              const differences: any = {}
              
              // Container boundingRect.left difference
              if (beforeValues.container?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined && afterValues.container?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.containerLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                  after: afterValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                  diff: afterValues.container.boundingRect.left - beforeValues.container.boundingRect.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Parent boundingRect.left difference
              if (beforeValues.parent?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined && afterValues.parent?.boundingRect?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.parentLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                  after: afterValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                  diff: afterValues.parent.boundingRect.left - beforeValues.parent.boundingRect.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Root container left difference
              if (beforeValues.rootContainer?.left !== undefined && afterValues.rootContainer?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.rootLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.rootContainer.left,
                  after: afterValues.rootContainer.left,
                  diff: afterValues.rootContainer.left - beforeValues.rootContainer.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Sidebar left difference
              if (beforeValues.sidebar?.left !== undefined && afterValues.sidebar?.left !== undefined) {
                differences.sidebarLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.sidebar.left,
                  after: afterValues.sidebar.left,
                  diff: afterValues.sidebar.left - beforeValues.sidebar.left,
                }
              }
              
              // Document scrollLeft difference
              if (beforeValues.document?.scrollLeft !== undefined && afterValues.document?.scrollLeft !== undefined) {
                differences.documentScrollLeft = {
                  before: beforeValues.document.scrollLeft,
                  after: afterValues.document.scrollLeft,
                  diff: afterValues.document.scrollLeft - beforeValues.document.scrollLeft,
                }
              }
              
              // Window scrollX difference
              if (beforeValues.window?.scrollX !== undefined && afterValues.window?.scrollX !== undefined) {
                differences.windowScrollX = {
                  before: beforeValues.window.scrollX,
                  after: afterValues.window.scrollX,
                  diff: afterValues.window.scrollX - beforeValues.window.scrollX,
                }
              }
              
              // Container width difference
              if (beforeValues.container?.offsetWidth !== undefined && afterValues.container?.offsetWidth !== undefined) {
                differences.containerWidth = {
                  before: beforeValues.container.offsetWidth,
                  after: afterValues.container.offsetWidth,
                  diff: afterValues.container.offsetWidth - beforeValues.container.offsetWidth,
                }
              }
              
              console.log("🔍 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - DIFFERENCES (BEFORE vs AFTER):", differences)
            }
            
            // Query DOM elements after delay to avoid interfering with drag-drop
            setTimeout(() => {
              try {
                const rgl = container.querySelector('.react-grid-layout') as HTMLElement
                const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
                const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
                
                console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - AFTER Adding Items (DOM Queries):", {
                  reactGridLayout: rgl ? {
                    offsetWidth: rgl.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: rgl.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: rgl.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: rgl.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: rgl.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: rgl.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                  rootContainer: root ? {
                    offsetWidth: root.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: root.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: root.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: root.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: root.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: root.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                  sidebar: sidebar ? {
                    offsetWidth: sidebar.offsetWidth,
                    clientWidth: sidebar.clientWidth,
                    scrollWidth: sidebar.scrollWidth,
                    offsetLeft: sidebar.offsetLeft,
                    scrollLeft: sidebar.scrollLeft,
                    boundingRect: sidebar.getBoundingClientRect(),
                  } : null,
                })
              } catch (error) {
                console.warn("📐 [AIGridLayout] Error querying DOM after drop:", error)
              }
            }, 200) // Additional delay for DOM queries
          }
        } catch (error) {
          console.warn("📐 [AIGridLayout] Error logging dimensions after drop:", error)
        }
      }, 100) // Wait for React to update DOM

      toast({
        title: "Application Added",
        description: `${completeApp.name} with ${disks.length} disk(s) added to grid (${newItems.length} grid items created)`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
      console.log("🎯 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - END")
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to add application to grid:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to grid",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast, currentGridSpaceId])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const [{ isOver }, drop] = useDrop(() => ({
    accept: "application",
    drop: async (item: { application: any }) => {
      console.log("🎯 Drop event triggered:", { item, currentGridSpaceId })
      
      // 如果没有选中的 Grid Space，自动创建一个
      let targetGridSpaceId = currentGridSpaceId
      if (!targetGridSpaceId && onCreateGridSpace) {
        console.log("🚀 No grid space, creating new one...")
        const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
        if (newId) {
          targetGridSpaceId = newId
          onGridSpaceCreated?.(newId)
          console.log("✅ Grid space created:", newId)
        } else {
          console.log("❌ Failed to create grid space")
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Failed to create grid space for dropping application",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }
      } else if (!targetGridSpaceId) {
        console.log("⚠️ No grid space and no create function")
        toast({
          title: "No Grid Space",
          description: "Please create or select a grid space first",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Use a default position if we can't calculate from drop
      const gridX = 0
      const gridY = 0

      // 使用临时变量确保 handleApplicationDrop 使用正确的 ID
      const tempGridSpaceId = targetGridSpaceId
      console.log("📦 Calling handleApplicationDrop with:", tempGridSpaceId)
      await handleApplicationDrop(item.application, gridX, gridY, tempGridSpaceId)
    },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isOver: monitor.isOver(),
    }),
  }), [currentGridSpaceId, handleApplicationDrop, onCreateGridSpace, onGridSpaceCreated, toast])

  // Handle layout change
  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    (newLayouts: Layout[], allLayouts: Layouts) => {
      console.log("🔄 [AIGridLayout] handleLayoutChange called:", {
        newLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(newLayouts),
        allLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(allLayouts),
        lgItems: allLayouts.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static, x: item.x, y: item.y })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })

      
      // Preserve static property from processedLayouts when layout changes
      const layoutsWithStatic: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(allLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = allLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        layoutsWithStatic[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
          return {
            ...layoutItem,
            static: isPinned, // Preserve static property based on isPinned
          }
        })
      })
      
      console.log("💾 Updating layouts with preserved static:", {
        lgItems: layoutsWithStatic.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static }))
      })
      
      setLayouts(layoutsWithStatic)
      onLayoutChange?.(layoutsWithStatic)
      
      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
    },
    [onLayoutChange, gridItems]
  )

  // Handle toggle pin state
  const handleTogglePin = useCallback(
    (itemId: string) => {
      console.log("🔒 handleTogglePin called:", { itemId, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() })
      
      setGridItems((prevItems) => {
        const item = prevItems.get(itemId)
        console.log("📦 Current item state:", { itemId, item, isPinned: item?.isPinned })
        
        if (!item) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Item not found:", itemId)
          return prevItems
        }

        const newIsPinned = !(item.isPinned || false)
        console.log("🔄 Toggling pin state:", { itemId, oldIsPinned: item.isPinned, newIsPinned })
        
        const updatedItem = { ...item, isPinned: newIsPinned }
        const updatedItems = new Map(prevItems)
        updatedItems.set(itemId, updatedItem)
        
        console.log("✅ Updated gridItems:", { 
          itemId, 
          updatedItem: updatedItems.get(itemId),
          totalItems: updatedItems.size 
        })

        // Update layouts to set static property based on pin state
        setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
          console.log("📐 Updating layouts with static property:", { itemId, newIsPinned })
          
          const updatedLayouts: Layouts = {}
          Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
            const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
            updatedLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = existingLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
              if (layoutItem.i === itemId) {
                const updatedLayoutItem = {
                  ...layoutItem,
                  static: newIsPinned, // Set static based on pin state
                }
                console.log(`  📍 ${breakpoint}: Updated layout item:`, updatedLayoutItem)
                return updatedLayoutItem
              }
              return layoutItem
            })
          })

          // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
          return updatedLayouts
        })

        return updatedItems
      })
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId]
  )

  // Generate processed layouts with static property based on isPinned state
  // This ensures ResponsiveGridLayout receives layouts with correct static values
  const processedLayouts = useMemo(() => {
    console.log("🔄 Recalculating processedLayouts:", { 
      layoutsCount: Object.keys(layouts).length,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      gridItemsKeys: Array.from(gridItems.keys())
    })
    
    const processed: Layouts = {}
    const breakpoints: (keyof Layouts)[] = ['lg', 'md', 'sm', 'xs', 'xxs']
    
    breakpoints.forEach((breakpoint) => {
      const baseLayout = layouts[breakpoint] || []
      processed[breakpoint] = baseLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
        const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
        const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
        
        const processedItem = {
          ...layoutItem,
          static: isPinned, // Set static based on pin state
        }
        
        if (isPinned) {
          console.log(`  📌 ${breakpoint} - Item ${layoutItem.i} is pinned, static=true`)
        }
        
        return processedItem
      })
    })
    
    console.log("✅ Processed layouts result:", {
      lg: processed.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static })),
      gridItems: Array.from(gridItems.entries()).map(([key, value]) => ({ 
        i: key, 
        isPinned: value.isPinned 
      }))
    })
    
    return processed
  }, [layouts, gridItems])

  // Generate layout items for current breakpoint (default to lg) for rendering
  const currentLayout = useMemo(() => {
    return processedLayouts.lg || []
  }, [processedLayouts])

  // Auto-scroll to a specific item
  const scrollToItem = useCallback((itemId: string) => {
    if (!gridContainerRef.current) return
    
    // Find the item element by data-grid attribute
    const itemElement = gridContainerRef.current.querySelector(`[data-grid][data-key="${itemId}"]`) as HTMLElement
    if (!itemElement) {
      // Try alternative selector
      const altElement = gridContainerRef.current.querySelector(`[data-grid]`) as HTMLElement
      if (altElement) {
        altElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center", inline: "center" })
      }
      return
    }

    // Scroll to the item with smooth behavior
    itemElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center", inline: "center" })
  }, [])


  // Combined ref for both drop target and scroll container
  const combinedRef = React.useCallback((node: HTMLDivElement | null) => {
    // Store ref for scroll operations
    gridContainerRef.current = node
    // Apply drop ref
    if (node && typeof drop === 'function') {
      drop(node)
    }
  }, [drop])

  // Handle grid selection
  const handleGridSelect = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setSelectedGridId(gridId)
  }, [])

  // Handle clicking outside to deselect
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (!gridContainerRef.current) return
      
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      
      // Exclude toolbar clicks - don't deselect when clicking on toolbar
      if (target.closest('[data-toolbar]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Exclude sidebar clicks - don't deselect when clicking on sidebar
      if (target.closest('[data-sidebar]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Exclude modal clicks - don't deselect when clicking on modal
      if (target.closest('[data-modal]')) {
        return
      }
      
      // Check if click is outside grid container
      if (!gridContainerRef.current.contains(target)) {
        setSelectedGridId(null)
        if (!editingLockId) {
          setEditingGridId(null)
        }
        return
      }

      // Check if click is on a grid item or its children
      const gridItem = target.closest('[data-grid-item]')
      if (!gridItem) {
        setSelectedGridId(null)
        if (!editingLockId) {
          setEditingGridId(null)
        }
      }
    }

    if (isEditMode) {
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
      return () => {
        document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
      }
    }
  }, [isEditMode, editingLockId])

  // Clear selections when exiting edit mode (if external state changes)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode) {
      setSelectedGridId(null)
      if (!editingLockId) {
        setEditingGridId(null)
      }
    }
  }, [isEditMode, editingLockId])

  // Handle grid edit request
  const handleGridEdit = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setEditingGridId(gridId)
    setEditingLockId(gridId)
    setSelectedGridId(gridId)
  }, [])

  // Get disk info for sidebar
  const editingDiskInfo = useMemo(() => {
    if (!editingGridId) return null
    const gridItem = gridItems.get(editingGridId)
    if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) return null
    const disk = gridItem.disks[0] // Each grid item contains only one disk
    return {
      diskId: disk.id,
      diskName: disk.name,
    }
  }, [editingGridId, gridItems])
  const isDiskSidebarOpen = !!editingDiskInfo

  const previousOverflowRef = useRef<{ body: string; html: string }>({ body: '', html: '' })

  useEffect(() => {
    const body = document.body
    const html = document.documentElement

    if (isDiskSidebarOpen) {
      previousOverflowRef.current = {
        body: body.style.overflowY,
        html: html.style.overflowY,
      }
      body.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
      html.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
    } else {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }

    return () => {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }
  }, [isDiskSidebarOpen])

  // Handle grid delete
  const handleGridDelete = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setGridItems((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      next.delete(gridId)
      return next
    })
    setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
      const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.filter((item) => item.i !== gridId)
      })
      return newLayouts
    })
    setSelectedGridId(null)
    if (!editingLockId || editingLockId === gridId) {
      setEditingGridId(null)
      setEditingLockId(null)
    }
    toast({
      title: "Deleted",
      description: "Grid item deleted",
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast])

  const handleTextEditChange = useCallback(
    ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => {
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.set(gridItemId, { diskId, markdown })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, onUnsavedChange]
  )

  const handleTextEditCommit = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => {
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(gridItemId)
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== diskId) {
            return disk
          }
          if (!disk.latestResult) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResult: {
              ...disk.latestResult,
              conclusion_detail: markdown,
              updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (!updatedItems) {
        return
      }

      try {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
        pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save text edit:", error)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
        if (currentGridSpaceId) {
          onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
        }
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save text changes. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, onUnsavedChange, saveGridSpaceData, toast]
  )

  // Handle grid cut
  const [runModalState, setRunModalState] = useState<{
    isOpen: boolean
    gridItemId: string | null
    disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | null
  }>({
    isOpen: false,
    gridItemId: null,
    disk: null,
  })

  // Helper function to parse dashboard requirement
  const parseDashboardRequirement = useCallback((disk: any) => {
    try {
      if (disk.category === "dashboard" && disk.requirement) {
        try {
          const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
          if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
            // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
            const dashboardCharts = charts
              .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
              .map((chart: any) => ({
                chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                queries: chart.queries,
                data_source: chart.data_source,
                created_at: chart.created_at,
                pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
              }))

            if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
              return {
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError: undefined,
              }
            } else {
              return {
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
              }
            }
          } else {
            return {
              dashboardCharts: undefined,
              dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.error(
            `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
            parseError
          )
          return {
            dashboardCharts: undefined,
            dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
          }
        }
      } else {
        return {
          dashboardCharts: undefined,
          dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
      return {
        dashboardCharts: undefined,
        dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const handleRefreshDisk = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => {
      try {
        // Get current disk info to check its category
        const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
        if (!currentItem) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Grid item not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        const currentDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
        if (!currentDisk) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Disk not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
        if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
          // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
          const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)

          // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
          const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

          // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
          setGridItems((prev) => {
            const next = new Map(prev)
            const item = next.get(gridItemId)
            if (!item) {
              return prev
            }

            const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
              if (disk.id !== diskId) {
                return disk
              }
              return {
                ...disk,
                ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError,
                latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
              }
            })

            const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
              ...item,
              disks: updatedDisks,
            }
            next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
            return next
          })

          toast({
            title: "Refreshed",
            description: "Dashboard charts have been refreshed with the latest configuration.",
            status: "success",
            duration: 2000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
        const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
        
        if (!results || results.length === 0) {
          toast({
            title: "No results found",
            description: "This disk does not have any execution results yet.",
            status: "info",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Get the latest result (first one in the array, as they are sorted by created_at desc)
        const latestResult = results[0]

        // Update gridItems with the new latestResult
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(gridItemId)
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== diskId) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResult,
              latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
          return next
        })

        toast({
          title: "Refreshed",
          description: "Disk result has been refreshed with the latest data.",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error: any) {
        console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Refresh Failed",
          description: error.message || "Failed to refresh disk. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [toast, gridItems, parseDashboardRequirement]
  )

  const handleRun = useCallback(
    (gridItemId: string) => {
      const gridItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) {
        toast({
          title: "No disk available",
          description: "This grid item does not have a disk to run.",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }
      const disk = gridItem.disks[0]
      setRunModalState({
        isOpen: true,
        gridItemId,
        disk,
      })
    },
    [gridItems, toast]
  )

  const handleRunModalClose = useCallback(() => {
    setRunModalState((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      isOpen: false,
    }))
  }, [])

  const handleRunCompleted = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!runModalState.gridItemId || !runModalState.disk) {
      return
    }
    try {
      const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(runModalState.disk.id)
      const latestResult = results[0] ?? null
      if (!latestResult) {
        return
      }

      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== runModalState.disk?.id) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            latestResult,
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (updatedItems) {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to refresh after run:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Refresh Failed",
        description: "Failed to refresh disk results after running.",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [runModalState.disk, runModalState.gridItemId, saveGridSpaceData, toast])

  console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout RETURN - About to render JSX, isEditMode:", isEditMode)

  return (
    <>
      {/* Disk Properties Sidebar */}
      {editingDiskInfo && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="fixed"
            top={0}
            left={0}
            right="400px"
            bottom={0}
            bg="rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
            zIndex={900}
            onClick={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
          <AIGridDiskSidebar
            diskId={editingDiskInfo.diskId}
            diskName={editingDiskInfo.diskName}
            isOpen={true}
            onClose={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
        </>
      )}
      
      <Box
        ref={combinedRef}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        border={isOver ? "2px dashed" : "none"}
        borderColor={isOver ? "blue.500" : "transparent"}
        overflow="hidden"
        bg="#ffffff"
        sx={{
          // Grid background pattern using pseudo-elements to avoid Chakra UI conflicts
          // This ensures both horizontal and vertical lines are displayed
          position: 'relative',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          '&::before': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Horizontal lines (to bottom)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '100% 15px',
          },
          '&::after': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Vertical lines (to right)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '15px 100%',
          },
        }}
      >

      
      <Box
        ref={(node) => {
          gridLayoutContainerRef.current = node
          // Log when ref is set
          if (node) {
            const nodeRect = node.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = node.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            console.log("🔗 [AIGridLayout] gridLayoutContainerRef - SET:", {
              offsetWidth: node.offsetWidth,
              clientWidth: node.clientWidth,
              scrollWidth: node.scrollWidth,
              offsetLeft: node.offsetLeft,
              scrollLeft: node.scrollLeft,
              boundingRect: {
                left: nodeRect.left,
                top: nodeRect.top,
                right: nodeRect.right,
                bottom: nodeRect.bottom,
                width: nodeRect.width,
                height: nodeRect.height,
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
            })
          }
        }}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        zIndex={1}
        flexShrink={0}
        flexGrow={0}
        sx={{
          // Ensure the container doesn't expand beyond parent
          boxSizing: 'border-box',
          // Prevent horizontal scrolling from causing layout shift
          overflowX: 'hidden',
          overflowY: isEditMode ? 'hidden' : 'auto',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          // Force width to be exactly 100% of parent, no more
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
        }}
      >
      <ResponsiveGridLayout
        className="layout"
        layouts={processedLayouts}
        breakpoints={{ lg: 1200, md: 996, sm: 768, xs: 480, xxs: 0 }}
        cols={GRID_CONFIG.cols}
        rowHeight={GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight}
        margin={GRID_CONFIG.margin}
        containerPadding={GRID_CONFIG.containerPadding}
        onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
        isDraggable={true}
        isResizable={true}
        resizeHandles={["se", "sw", "ne", "nw", "s", "n", "e", "w"]}
        compactType={null}
        draggableHandle=".grid-drag-handle"
      >
        {currentLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          if (!itemData) return null

          console.log("📦 Rendering AIGridItem:", {
            itemId: layoutItem.i,
            hasOnTogglePin: !!handleTogglePin,
            isPinned: itemData.isPinned,
            static: layoutItem.static
          })

          return (
            <Box 
              key={layoutItem.i} 
              data-grid={layoutItem} 
              data-key={layoutItem.i}
              data-grid-item={layoutItem.i}
            >
              <AIGridItem 
                data={itemData} 
                onTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
                isEditMode={isEditMode}
                isSelected={selectedGridId === layoutItem.i}
                onSelect={() => handleGridSelect(layoutItem.i)}
                onEdit={() => handleGridEdit(layoutItem.i)}
                onDelete={() => handleGridDelete(layoutItem.i)}
                onRun={() => handleRun(layoutItem.i)}
                onTextEditChange={handleTextEditChange}
                onTextEditCommit={handleTextEditCommit}
                onRefreshDisk={handleRefreshDisk}
              />
            </Box>
          )
        })}
      </ResponsiveGridLayout>
      {runModalState.disk && (
        <AIGridRunModal
          isOpen={runModalState.isOpen}
          disk={runModalState.disk}
          onClose={handleRunModalClose}
          onCompleted={handleRunCompleted}
        />
      )}
      </Box>
    </Box>
    </>
  )
}

```

已完成修改。实现内容如下：

## 实现内容

### 1. 拖拽 application 生成 grid 时过滤（第680-682行）
- 在过滤 disk children 时，同时排除 `category === "questionnaire"` 的 disk
- 修改前：只过滤 `node_type === "disk"`
- 修改后：过滤 `node_type === "disk" && child.category !== "questionnaire"`

### 2. 加载已有 grid space 数据时过滤（第409-418行）
- 在 `loadGridSpaceData` 中，处理 disks 时先过滤掉 questionnaire 类型的 disk
- 如果某个 grid item 的所有 disks 都被过滤掉，则删除整个 grid item（避免显示空的 grid item）

## 功能特点

1. 新拖拽的 application：不会包含 questionnaire 类型的 disk
2. 已保存的 grid space：加载时自动过滤掉 questionnaire 类型的 disk
3. 空 item 处理：如果 grid item 的所有 disks 都被过滤，自动删除该 item

代码已通过语法检查，无错误。现在 questionnaire 类型的 disk 不会在 grid 中展示。

**Cursor**

分析 dashboard 类型 disk 的图表显示问题，检查当前实现：


查看完整的图表渲染代码：


## 问题分析

### 当前实现情况
1. 图表容器高度：固定 `280px`
2. 标题与图表间距：`VStack spacing={2}`，间距较小
3. ECharts 配置：直接使用 `echarts_option`，未调整 `grid` 配置

### 重叠原因
1. 容器高度不足：当 ECharts 包含 `title` 和 `legend` 时，280px 可能不够
2. Grid 配置缺失：未为 `title` 和 `legend` 预留空间，导致与图表内容重叠
3. 标题与图表间距不足：`spacing={2}` 可能过小

## 优化方案

### 方案1：增加容器高度和间距（简单）
- 将图表容器高度从 `280px` 调整为 `320px` 或 `350px`
- 将 `VStack spacing` 从 `2` 调整为 `4` 或 `6`
- 优点：实现简单
- 缺点：可能仍存在重叠

### 方案2：调整 ECharts grid 配置（推荐）
- 在渲染前处理 `echarts_option`，确保 `grid` 为 `title` 和 `legend` 预留空间
- 如果存在 `title`，设置 `grid.top` 预留空间（如 `60px`）
- 如果存在 `legend`，根据位置设置 `grid.top` 或 `grid.bottom`
- 优点：从配置层面解决重叠
- 缺点：需要处理不同图表类型

### 方案3：组合优化（推荐）
- 增加容器高度：从 `280px` 调整为 `320px`
- 增加间距：`VStack spacing` 从 `2` 调整为 `4`
- 调整 ECharts grid 配置：为 `title` 和 `legend` 预留空间
  - 如果存在 `title`，设置 `grid.top: 60`
  - 如果存在 `legend` 且位置为 `top`，增加 `grid.top`
  - 如果存在 `legend` 且位置为 `bottom`，设置 `grid.bottom: 50`

## 我的建议

采用方案3（组合优化）：
1. 增加容器高度到 `320px`
2. 增加 `VStack spacing` 到 `4`
3. 添加 ECharts 配置处理函数，自动调整 `grid` 配置

这样可确保：
- 图表有足够空间
- `title` 和 `legend` 有合适的定位空间
- 标题与图表分离更清晰

实现方案3（组合优化）：增加容器高度、增加间距，并添加 ECharts 配置处理函数。


```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
import { Box, VStack, HStack, Text, Badge, useColorModeValue, IconButton, Tooltip, Menu, MenuButton, MenuList, MenuItem, Portal } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiLock, FiUnlock, FiMoreVertical, FiEdit, FiTrash2, FiType, FiPlay, FiRefreshCw } from "react-icons/fi"
import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"
import remarkGfm from "remark-gfm"
import rehypeRaw from "rehype-raw"
import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react"
import type { EChartsOption } from "echarts"
import { GridItemData, RichTextCommand } from "./types"
import { useRichTextEditorState } from "./hooks/useRichTextEditorState"
import { AIGridRichToolbar } from "./AIGridRichToolbar"
import { clampSelectionRange } from "./utils/markdownTransformUtils"

interface AIGridItemProps {
  data: GridItemData
  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
  isEditMode?: boolean
  isSelected?: boolean
  onSelect?: () => void
  onEdit?: () => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  onRun?: () => void
  onTextEditChange?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => void
  onTextEditCommit?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => Promise<void> | void
  onRefreshDisk?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => Promise<void> | void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// 调整 ECharts 配置，为 title 和 legend 预留空间，避免重叠
function adjustEChartsOptionForGrid(option: any): any {
  if (!option || typeof option !== 'object') {
    return option
  }

  const adjusted = { ...option }
  
  // 确保 grid 配置存在
  if (!adjusted.grid) {
    adjusted.grid = {}
  } else {
    adjusted.grid = { ...adjusted.grid }
  }

  // 计算需要的顶部空间
  let topSpace = 20 // 基础顶部间距
  
  // 如果存在 title，增加顶部空间
  if (adjusted.title && typeof adjusted.title === 'object') {
    const title = adjusted.title
    // title 通常在顶部，需要预留空间
    if (title.show !== false) {
      topSpace += 40 // title 高度约 30-40px
    }
  }
  
  // 如果存在 legend 且在顶部，增加顶部空间
  if (adjusted.legend && typeof adjusted.legend === 'object') {
    const legend = adjusted.legend
    if (legend.show !== false) {
      const legendPosition = legend.top || legend.bottom || 'top'
      if (legendPosition === 'top' || (!legend.bottom && !legend.top)) {
        // legend 在顶部，需要预留空间
        topSpace += 35 // legend 高度约 30-35px
      }
    }
  }

  // 设置 grid.top 为计算出的顶部空间
  adjusted.grid.top = topSpace

  // 如果存在 legend 且在底部，设置 grid.bottom
  if (adjusted.legend && typeof adjusted.legend === 'object') {
    const legend = adjusted.legend
    if (legend.show !== false && legend.bottom) {
      adjusted.grid.bottom = 50 // legend 在底部，预留空间
    } else {
      // legend 不在底部时，确保有足够的底部空间
      adjusted.grid.bottom = adjusted.grid.bottom || 20
    }
  } else {
    adjusted.grid.bottom = adjusted.grid.bottom || 20
  }

  // 设置左右边距，确保图表内容不贴边
  adjusted.grid.left = adjusted.grid.left || 50
  adjusted.grid.right = adjusted.grid.right || 30

  return adjusted
}

// 提取表格数据：从 React 元素树中提取所有单元格内容
function extractTableData(tableChildren: React.ReactNode): string[][] {
  const rows: string[][] = []
  
  const processElement = (element: any, depth: number = 0): void => {
    if (!element || typeof element !== 'object') {
      return
    }
    
    // 处理 React 元素
    if (element.type) {
      const type = element.type
      const typeName = typeof type === 'string' ? type.toLowerCase() : (typeof type === 'function' ? type.name || 'function' : String(type))
      
      // 如果是 tr（表格行），直接提取行数据
      if (typeName === 'tr') {
        const row: string[] = []
        const processCell = (cell: any): void => {
          if (cell && cell.props && cell.props.children !== undefined) {
            const cellContent = extractTextContent(cell.props.children)
            row.push(cellContent.trim())
          }
        }
        
        // 处理 children（td 或 th）
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const cellChildren = Array.isArray(element.props.children) 
            ? element.props.children 
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          cellChildren.forEach(processCell)
        }
        
        if (row.length > 0) {
          rows.push(row)
        }
        return // 找到 tr 后不再递归，避免重复处理
      }
      
      // 如果是 thead 或 tbody，递归处理其子元素
      if (typeName === 'thead' || typeName === 'tbody') {
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
            ? element.props.children
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          childElements.forEach(child => processElement(child, depth + 1))
        }
        return
      }
      
      // 其他元素递归处理子元素
      if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
        const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
          ? element.props.children
          : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
        childElements.forEach(child => processElement(child, depth + 1))
      }
    }
    
    // 处理数组
    if (Array.isArray(element)) {
      element.forEach(item => processElement(item, depth + 1))
    }
  }
  
  if (!tableChildren) {
    return rows
  }
  
  const childArray = Array.isArray(tableChildren) ? tableChildren : [tableChildren]
  childArray.forEach(child => processElement(child, 0))
  
  return rows
}

// 提取文本内容：从 React 节点中提取纯文本
function extractTextContent(node: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof node === 'string' || typeof node === 'number') {
    return String(node)
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(node)) {
    return node.map(extractTextContent).join('')
  }
  
  if (node && typeof node === 'object' && 'props' in node) {
    if (node.props && node.props.children) {
      return extractTextContent(node.props.children)
    }
  }
  
  return ''
}

// 转置表格数据：行变列，列变行
function transposeTable(data: string[][]): string[][] {
  if (data.length === 0) return []
  
  const maxCols = Math.max(...data.map(row => row.length))
  const transposed: string[][] = []
  
  for (let col = 0; col < maxCols; col++) {
    const newRow: string[] = []
    for (let row = 0; row < data.length; row++) {
      newRow.push(data[row][col] || '')
    }
    transposed.push(newRow)
  }
  
  return transposed
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ 
  data, 
  onTogglePin,
  isEditMode = false,
  isSelected = false,
  onSelect,
  onEdit,
  onDelete,
  onRun,
  onTextEditChange,
  onTextEditCommit,
  onRefreshDisk,
}) => {
  // New style: white background, no border (or very subtle), no rounded corners
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 14px for all titles/headers
  const titleTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "14px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for grid item (light by default, dark on hover)
  // Light mode: light gray track and thumb
  // Dark mode: darker gray track and thumb
  const gridScrollbarTrackLight = useColorModeValue("#f5f5f5", "#2d3748")
  const gridScrollbarThumbLight = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)")
  const gridScrollbarThumbDark = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)")
  
  // Scrollbar layout adjustments
  const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [activeDiskId, setActiveDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [toolbarAnchorRect, setToolbarAnchorRect] = useState<DOMRect | null>(null)
  const toolbarAnchorRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const [editedMarkdownByDisk, setEditedMarkdownByDisk] = useState<Map<number, string>>(new Map())
  // Loading state for disk refresh
  const [refreshingDiskIds, setRefreshingDiskIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set())
  const primaryDisk = data.disks[0]
  const canEditText = !!primaryDisk?.latestResult?.conclusion_detail
  const {
    isOpen: isTextEditorOpen,
    activeGridItemId,
    currentMarkdown,
    selection,
    openEditor,
    applyCommand,
    updateSelection,
    closeEditor,
  } = useRichTextEditorState()
  const scrollPaddingRight = isMenuOpen ? 'calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 10px)' : 'calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 8px)'
  const scrollMarginRight = isMenuOpen ? '-6px' : '-6px'
  // Refs for grid item
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode && isMenuOpen) {
      setIsMenuOpen(false)
    }
  }, [isEditMode, isMenuOpen])

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  const isToolbarVisible =
    isEditMode && isTextEditorOpen && activeGridItemId === data.i && toolbarAnchorRect !== null

  const assignToolbarAnchor = useCallback(
    (node: HTMLDivElement | null) => {
      if (node && isTextEditorOpen) {
        toolbarAnchorRef.current = node
        setToolbarAnchorRect(node.getBoundingClientRect())
      } else if (!node && toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
        toolbarAnchorRef.current = null
        setToolbarAnchorRect(null)
      }
    },
    [isTextEditorOpen]
  )

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isToolbarVisible || !toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
      return
    }
    const updateRect = () => {
      if (toolbarAnchorRef.current) {
        setToolbarAnchorRect(toolbarAnchorRef.current.getBoundingClientRect())
      }
    }
    updateRect()
    window.addEventListener("scroll", updateRect, true)
    window.addEventListener("resize", updateRect)
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", updateRect, true)
      window.removeEventListener("resize", updateRect)
    }
  }, [isToolbarVisible, currentMarkdown])

  const getSelectionFromDom = useCallback((): { start: number; end: number } | null => {
    if (!toolbarAnchorRef.current) return null
    const selectionObj = window.getSelection()
    if (!selectionObj || selectionObj.rangeCount === 0) return null
    const range = selectionObj.getRangeAt(0)
    if (
      !toolbarAnchorRef.current.contains(range.startContainer) ||
      !toolbarAnchorRef.current.contains(range.endContainer)
    ) {
      return null
    }
    const resolveOffset = (node: Node, offset: number): number | null => {
      const element =
        node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE
          ? (node.parentElement?.closest("[data-md-start]") as HTMLElement | null)
          : (node as HTMLElement).closest("[data-md-start]") as HTMLElement | null
      if (!element) return null
      const baseStart = Number.parseInt(element.dataset.mdStart ?? "0", 10)
      return node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? baseStart + offset : baseStart
    }
    const start = resolveOffset(range.startContainer, range.startOffset)
    const end = resolveOffset(range.endContainer, range.endOffset)
    if (start === null || end === null) {
      const fallbackText = selectionObj.toString()
      if (!fallbackText) {
        return null
      }
      const preferredStart =
        selection.start < selection.end
          ? currentMarkdown.indexOf(fallbackText, selection.start)
          : -1
      const absoluteStart =
        preferredStart !== -1 ? preferredStart : currentMarkdown.indexOf(fallbackText)
      if (absoluteStart === -1) {
        return null
      }
      return clampSelectionRange(currentMarkdown, {
        start: absoluteStart,
        end: absoluteStart + fallbackText.length,
      })
    }
    return clampSelectionRange(currentMarkdown, { start, end })
  }, [currentMarkdown, selection])

  const captureSelection = useCallback(() => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i) return
    const selectionRange = getSelectionFromDom()
    if (selectionRange) {
      updateSelection(selectionRange)
    }
  }, [activeGridItemId, data.i, getSelectionFromDom, isTextEditorOpen, updateSelection])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen) return
    document.addEventListener("selectionchange", captureSelection)
    return () => document.removeEventListener("selectionchange", captureSelection)
  }, [captureSelection, isTextEditorOpen])

  const commitTextEdit = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i || activeDiskId === null) {
      return
    }
    const result = closeEditor({ commit: true })
    if (result.hasChanges && result.committedMarkdown) {
      await onTextEditCommit?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: activeDiskId,
        markdown: result.committedMarkdown,
      })
      setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(activeDiskId, result.committedMarkdown || "")
        return next
      })
    }
    setActiveDiskId(null)
    setToolbarAnchorRect(null)
  }, [activeDiskId, activeGridItemId, closeEditor, data.i, isTextEditorOpen, onTextEditCommit])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode) {
      void commitTextEdit()
    }
  }, [commitTextEdit, isEditMode])

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      void commitTextEdit()
    }
  }, [commitTextEdit])

  const handleToolbarCommand = useCallback(
    (command: RichTextCommand) => {
      if (!isTextEditorOpen || activeGridItemId !== data.i || activeDiskId === null) {
        return
      }
      const result = applyCommand(command)
      if (result) {
        setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          next.set(activeDiskId, result.markdown)
          return next
        })
        onTextEditChange?.({
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: activeDiskId,
          markdown: result.markdown,
        })
      }
    },
    [activeDiskId, activeGridItemId, applyCommand, data.i, isTextEditorOpen, onTextEditChange]
  )

  const handleEditText = useCallback(
    (disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | undefined) => {
      if (!disk) return
      void commitTextEdit()
      const baseMarkdown =
        editedMarkdownByDisk.get(disk.id) ?? disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail ?? ""
      setActiveDiskId(disk.id)
      openEditor({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        markdown: baseMarkdown,
        selection: { start: 0, end: baseMarkdown.length },
      })
      setEditedMarkdownByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(disk.id, baseMarkdown)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: disk.id,
        markdown: baseMarkdown,
      })
    },
    [commitTextEdit, data.i, editedMarkdownByDisk, onTextEditChange, openEditor]
  )

  
  // Handle click to select (only in edit mode)
  const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (isEditMode && onSelect) {
      // Don't select if clicking on buttons or menu
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      if (!target.closest('button') && !target.closest('[role="menu"]')) {
        onSelect()
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Border style: selected state shows blue border, pinned state shows orange border
  const borderWidth = isSelected ? "2px" : (isPinned ? "3px" : "0px")
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const borderColorSelected = "blue.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isSelected ? borderColorSelected : (isPinned ? borderColorPinned : "transparent")


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="0"
      pt={4}
      pl={4}
      pr={4}
      pb={2}
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="hidden"
      shadow={isSelected ? "lg" : "none"}
      sx={{
        paddingRight: scrollPaddingRight,
        marginRight: scrollMarginRight,
        scrollbarWidth: 'thin',
        scrollbarGutter: 'auto',
        scrollbarColor: `${gridScrollbarThumbLight} ${gridScrollbarTrackLight}`,
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar': {
          width: '8px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-track': {
          background: gridScrollbarTrackLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb': {
          background: gridScrollbarThumbLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
          transition: 'background 0.2s ease',
          '&:hover': {
            background: gridScrollbarThumbDark,
          },
        },
      }}
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s"
      onClick={handleClick}
      cursor={isEditMode ? "pointer" : "default"}
      _hover={isEditMode ? { borderColor: isSelected ? "blue.500" : "gray.300", borderWidth: "1px" } : {}}
    >
      {/* Selection corner indicators (blue squares) */}
      {isSelected && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag (disabled in edit mode) */}
      {!isEditMode && (
        <Box
          className="grid-drag-handle"
          position="absolute"
          top={0}
          left={0}
          right={0}
          bottom={0}
          cursor="grab"
          _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
          zIndex={1}
        />
      )}
      {/* Top Right Buttons Container - Mutually exclusive: three-dot menu in edit mode, Pin button in non-edit mode */}
      {/* Position adjusted to avoid overlap with scrollbar (scrollbar width ~8-17px); add extra 8px spacing */}
      <Box 
        position="absolute" 
        top={2} 
        right="28px"
        zIndex={1001}
        pointerEvents="auto"
      >
        {/* Three dots menu (only in edit mode) - replaces Pin button */}
        {isEditMode ? (
          (() => {
            console.log("🔵 AIGridItem rendering three-dot menu (edit mode):", {
              itemId: data.i,
              isEditMode,
              hasOnEdit: !!onEdit,
              hasOnDelete: !!onDelete,
            })
            return (
              <Menu
                onOpen={() => setIsMenuOpen(true)}
                onClose={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                <MenuButton
                  as={IconButton}
                  aria-label="More options"
                  icon={<FiMoreVertical />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    console.log("🔵 Three-dot menu button clicked")
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                />
                <Portal containerRef={gridItemRef}>
                  <MenuList
                    onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    overflow="visible"
                    maxH="unset"
                    onWheel={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    onTouchMove={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    sx={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}
                    css={{
                      '&::-webkit-scrollbar': { display: 'none' },
                    }}
                  >
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiEdit />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      console.log("🔵 Edit menu item clicked")
                      onEdit?.()
                    }}>
                      编辑Disk属性
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiType />} isDisabled={!canEditText} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      handleEditText(primaryDisk)
                    }}>
                      编辑文本
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiPlay />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onRun?.()
                    }}>
                      运行
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiTrash2 />} color="red.500" onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onDelete?.()
                    }}>
                      Delete
                    </MenuItem>
                  </MenuList>
                </Portal>
              </Menu>
            )
          })()
        ) : (
          /* Pin/Unpin Button (only in non-edit mode) - replaces three-dot menu */
          onTogglePin ? (
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          ) : null
        )}
      </Box>
      {isEditMode && (
        <AIGridRichToolbar
          isVisible={isToolbarVisible}
          anchorRect={toolbarAnchorRect}
          onCommand={handleToolbarCommand}
        />
      )}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="visible">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => {
              const baseMarkdown = disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail ?? ""
              const cachedMarkdown = editedMarkdownByDisk.get(disk.id)
              const isEditingThisDisk =
                isTextEditorOpen && activeDiskId === disk.id && activeGridItemId === data.i
              const displayMarkdown = isEditingThisDisk
                ? currentMarkdown
                : cachedMarkdown ?? baseMarkdown

              const isRefreshing = refreshingDiskIds.has(disk.id)

              const handleRefreshDisk = useCallback(async (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
                e.stopPropagation()
                if (!onRefreshDisk || isRefreshing) return

                setRefreshingDiskIds(prev => new Set(prev).add(disk.id))
                try {
                  await onRefreshDisk({ gridItemId: data.i, diskId: disk.id })
                } catch (error) {
                  console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
                } finally {
                  setRefreshingDiskIds(prev => {
                    const next = new Set(prev)
                    next.delete(disk.id)
                    return next
                  })
                }
              }, [onRefreshDisk, disk.id, data.i, isRefreshing])

              return (
                <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                    <Tooltip 
                      label={disk.category === "dashboard" ? "刷新图表配置" : "刷新最新结果"} 
                      placement="top"
                    >
                      <IconButton
                        aria-label={disk.category === "dashboard" ? "Refresh dashboard charts" : "Refresh disk result"}
                        icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                        size="xs"
                        variant="ghost"
                        colorScheme="gray"
                        isLoading={isRefreshing}
                        onClick={handleRefreshDisk}
                        onMouseDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                        _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                        transition="all 0.2s"
                      />
                    </Tooltip>
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflow="visible"
                        >
                          <HStack
                            spacing={4}
                            align="stretch"
                            flexWrap="wrap"
                          >
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                flex="1 1 360px"
                                minW="260px"
                                maxW="100%"
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="0"
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="280px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                      ref={isEditingThisDisk ? assignToolbarAnchor : undefined}
                      onMouseUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onKeyUp={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                      onTouchEnd={isEditingThisDisk ? captureSelection : undefined}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {displayMarkdown ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = displayMarkdown
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          // Markdown rendering
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
```
